title: Digital Collaboration Specialist (With Sharepoint experience)
description:
ABOUT 10X HEALTH SYSTEM

10X Health System is a pioneering company at the forefront of the health and wellness industry, dedicated to revolutionizing the way individuals approach their personal health and well-being. With a philosophy rooted in the principle that optimal health is the foundation for a life lived to the fullest, 10X Health provides cutting-edge solutions and personalized health plans designed to empower individuals to achieve and maintain peak physical and mental performance. The company's comprehensive approach to health combines the latest advances in medical science, nutrition, fitness, and technology to offer a suite of services that include state-of-the-art diagnostic testing, individualized treatment protocols, and ongoing support from a team of world-class health professionals. 10X Health's commitment to innovation and results has established it as a leader in the health optimization space, catering to those who strive to push the boundaries of what is possible in their health journey.



POSITION SUMMARY

The Digital Collaboration Specialist supports the organization’s internal collaboration and knowledge management systems by maintaining SharePoint sites, building automated workflows, and developing visually consistent internal materials. This role helps ensure company resources, documentation, and tools are organized, accessible, and easy for teams to use. Working cross-functionally with multiple departments, the Digital Collaboration Specialist coordinates the collection and structuring of internal resources, supports the development of SharePoint pages and Power Automate workflows, and creates branded presentation templates and visual assets. The role plays an important part in improving operational efficiency by helping teams centralize information, streamline processes, and maintain consistent communication materials. This position requires a combination of technical proficiency, visual design capability, and strong organizational skills, with a focus on enabling teams to access the tools and information they need to work effectively.



OBJECTIVES

• Support the design, development, and maintenance of SharePoint sites to ensure internal resources are organized, accessible, and easy for teams to navigate.

• Build and maintain automated workflows using Power Automate to streamline operational processes and reduce manual administrative tasks.

• Create visually polished slide decks and presentation materials that align with company branding and communication standards.

• Develop and maintain presentation templates, style guides, and visual assets to promote consistency across internal communications and documentation.

• Coordinate with cross-functional teams to gather, organize, and centralize company resources, ensuring information is accurately documented and easily accessible.

• Maintain structured documentation of shared resources within SharePoint and other internal platforms to ensure information remains current and reliable.

• Monitor usage and collect feedback from internal stakeholders to support ongoing improvements to SharePoint sites, workflows, and internal documentation tools.

• Assist in identifying opportunities to improve efficiency through better use of digital tools, documentation, and automated processes.



COMPETENCIES

• High attention to detail, with a focus on quality control and consistency in branding, formatting, and content delivery.

• Skilled in creating standardized templates and assets that can be leveraged across the organization.

• Demonstrated proficiency with Microsoft SharePoint, Microsoft Office (PowerPoint, Word, Excel), and visual design tools such as Canva.

• Ability to produce clear, accurate documentation and visual content that simplifies complex information for diverse teams.

• Strong business acumen with the ability to understand operational priorities and translate them into effective solutions.

• Thorough grasp of company principles, frameworks, and messaging, with the ability to translate them into clear, engaging training content and internal communications that reinforce alignment and learning.

• Proficiency in visual tools and process mapping software such as L
 or similar platforms.



EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE

• Bachelor’s degree in Business, Communications, or a related field preferred, or equivalent professional experience in administrative, operations, or content.

• Prior experience supporting internal systems, content development, or process documentation in a fast-paced, cross-functional environment is a plus.



PHYSICAL REQUIREMENTS

• Prolonged periods sitting at a desk and working on a computer.



COMMITMENT TO DIVERSITY

As an equal opportunity employer committed to meeting the needs of a multigenerational and multicultural workforce Cardone Ventures recognizes that a diverse staff, reflective of our community, is an integral and welcome part of a successful and ethical business. We hire local talent at all levels regardless of race, color, religion, age, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation or disability, and actively foster inclusion in all forms both within our company and across interactions with clients, candidates and partners.



If this position caught your eye, send us your resume! For best consideration, please complete the online application form:


/

title: Video Production Specialist
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



Alloy is a growth partner for association management companies across the U.S. We’re looking for a

Video Production Specialist to join our team and produce high-volume, polished video content

across a range of formats—from marketing campaigns to educational content to social media.

You’ll be our go-to person for all things video. That means you should be just as comfortable editing

a talking-head interview as you are assembling a complex piece with mixed assets like motion

graphics, screen recordings, and slide-based visuals. Because we work with multiple clients across

different industries and brand voices, you’ll need to adapt your style and creative approach to match

each client’s tone, aesthetic, and audience.



This is not a “wait for footage” role. Our clients rarely have existing video assets, so you’ll need to be

a resourceful creator who can build compelling content from scratch using stock footage, AI-

generated media, motion graphics, and original assets. You’ll work alongside strategists and account

managers who handle ideation and client relationships, but you’ll have significant creative ownership

over how content comes to life.



WHAT YOU’LL BE WORKING ON

   • Marketing videos — promotional content, brand storytelling, product explainers, and

campaign assets

   • Talking-head videos — clean, professional edits with dynamic pacing, lower thirds, b-roll

cutaways, and branded overlays

   • Webinar and presentation edits — transforming raw webinar recordings and slide decks

into polished, engaging content

   • E-course and learning content — lesson videos for online courses, including multi-format

edits that blend talking head, slides, screen captures, and graphics

   • Social media clips — short-form vertical and horizontal cuts optimized for Instagram,

TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn

   • Mixed-asset production — assembling final videos from a variety of source materials

including talking-head footage, motion graphics, static graphics, and audio tracks

   • Stock footage and AI-generated content — sourcing, curating, and creatively repurposing

stock footage and AI-generated visuals to build narratives when original footage is

unavailable

   • Template and asset library management — maintaining organized project files, branded

templates, and reusable asset libraries to support high-volume output without sacrificing

quality



WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR



Must-Have

   • Proven experience in video production and post-production, with a portfolio that

demonstrates range across multiple video formats



Adobe Creative Suite proficiency:



– Premiere Pro — your primary editing environment

– After Effects — for motion graphics, compositing, and visual polish

– Photoshop — for asset creation, thumbnail design, and graphic prep

– Audition — for audio cleanup, mixing, and mastering



AI video tool fluency — you actively use AI-powered tools (e.g., Runway, Descript, HeyGen,

ElevenLabs, Opus Clip, CapCut, Pika, or similar) to accelerate production without sacrificing quality.

This is a major requirement—we want someone who is already integrating AI into their workflow, not

just curious about it.



   • Familiarity with AI-powered research and scripting workflows (e.g., Google NotebookLM,

Claude, ChatGPT) for content development and scripting support

   • Demonstrated ability to build polished video content from stock footage, screen recordings,

and limited source material—you don’t wait for perfect assets to start creating

   • Strong eye for quality—every deliverable should feel polished and professional, whether it’s

a 15-second social clip or a 45-minute course module

   • Ability to work with mixed media—comfortable combining talking-head footage, motion

graphics, static slides, screen recordings, and audio into cohesive final products

   • Strong eye for pacing, color grading, typography, and sound design

   • Comfortable working across formats: horizontal (YouTube/web), vertical

(Reels/TikTok/Shorts), and square (social)

   • Reliable communication and availability—responsive, proactive, and comfortable working

asynchronously across time zones



Nice-to-Have

   • Animation skills (2D motion design, character animation, kinetic typography, Lottie, etc.)

   • Experience with color grading and advanced audio design

   • Familiarity with YouTube optimization (thumbnails, chapters, end screens)

   • Experience producing content for marketing funnels or growth campaigns

   • Experience in an agency or white-label environment serving multiple brands

   • Familiarity with the HOA, property management, or real estate industry

   • Basic knowledge of SEO and social media distribution strategies for video content

   • Experience with DaVinci Resolve or other editing platforms

   • Illustration, graphic design, or 3D motion skills

   • Ability to work from creative briefs with minimal hand-holding



WHAT WE OFFER

   • Fully remote position with flexible scheduling

   • The opportunity to shape a growing creative function from the ground up

   • A collaborative, low-ego team that values speed, quality, and resourcefulness

   • Exposure to a wide variety of client industries and creative challenges

   • Room to grow as our video capabilities expand across the client portfolio



HOW TO APPLY

Please submit:



1. Your portfolio or showreel — we want to see range. Include examples of talking-head

edits, mixed-asset videos, social clips, and any course/webinar content you’ve produced.

Bonus points for work where you built something compelling without much source material.

2. A brief note on your AI workflow — tell us which AI tools you use, how you use them, and

how they’ve improved your speed or output quality.

3. Your availability and preferred working hours.

We value speed, quality, and creative problem-solving. If you’re someone who’s constantly leveling

up your toolkit and can deliver professional-grade video content efficiently, we’d love to hear from

you.

4. 2–3 minute video intro (Loom or Drive link)

5. Please share your video portfolio



***  Incomplete applications will not be reviewed. ***

title: Social Media Growth Manager
description:
We are looking for a growth-focused Social Media Manager to take full ownership of the organic social performance of both Scream Pretty and Lily Charmed.



This is not just a content creation or scheduling role. You will be responsible for:

•  Growing our audience and interactions across platforms.

•  Increasing engagement and interaction with the right customers.

•  Building clear, repeatable content and channel strategy.

•  Turning social into a consistent, measurable growth channel for the business.



We already have established accounts with solid foundations. The opportunity — and expectation — is to unlock growth, improve performance, and create structure where it currently doesn't exist.

You will plan strategy, create and edit content, grow engaged audiences, and report on performance across primary channels Instagram and YouTube initially, with TikTok and Pinterest as the secondary focus once primary channel cadence is established.

You will work closely with the founder (Lucy) and paid media lead (Alex), using AI tools (including Claude) to accelerate content ideation and caption writing in brand voice, with British English. Video and photography assets will be provided; your job is to shape them into compelling content, edit where needed, and ensure everything published is on-brand and audience-appropriate.



Strategy & Planning



•  Develop and manage a monthly content calendar for both brands across all platforms, aligned to the brand marketing plan.

•  Build platform-specific growth strategies tailored to each brand's audience, tone of voice, and business objectives — not just posting plans.

•  Identify what content drives reach (discovery), what drives engagement (saves, shares, comments), and what drives repeat interaction — and translate these insights into clear content directions, scalable formats, and ongoing testing plans.

•  Plan content themes aligned with product launches, campaigns, and seasonal 
nts.

Write content creation briefs for creators to deliver you raw footage  / images to edit

•  Stay ahead of platform algorithm changes, trends, and content formats.



Content Creation & Editing



•  Edit short-form video for Instagram Reels and TikTok using CapCut or equivalent tools.

•  Create on-brand graphics and static content using Canva.

•  Write compelling captions optimised for engagement and reach — distinct tone per brand, in British English.

•  Repurpose content across platforms intelligently — not just copy/paste.

•  Work with provided photography and video assets to produce polished, publish-ready content.

•  Upload and tag YouTube Shorts and assist with repurposing long-form YouTube content.

Publishing & Community Management

•  Schedule and publish content across Instagram and YouTube (primary), TikTok and Pinterest (secondary).

•  Update
 and Instagram header and profile assets per campaign cycle.

•  Monitor and respond to comments and DMs across all platforms for both brands daily, maintaining a positive, on-brand community voice.

•  Escalate issues or sensitive interactions appropriately.

•  Pin and tag products on Pinterest consistently.



UGC & Creator Support

•  Track creator content performance and flag high-performing assets to the wider team for use in paid campaigns.

•  Identify organic UGC that can be repurposed and recycled into paid social content.



Analytics & Reporting

•  Pull monthly social performance reports across all platforms and brands, set against agreed KPI metrics via a 
 dashboard.

•  Track key metrics: follower growth, engagement rate, reach, saves, and link clicks.

•  Identify what's working, what isn't, and recommend changes with evidence.

•  Present monthly insights in a clear format for the founder and paid media lead.



WAYS OF WORKING



•  Content planned and scheduled a minimum of one month in advance, allowing a full approval process aligned to brand voice and marketing campaigns.

•  
 used for content approvals, task management, and campaign alignment.

•  Weekly check-in with the paid media lead; monthly review with the founder.

•  Async-first working style — clear written communication is essential.

•  British English used in all captions, copy, and communications.



ABOUT THE BRANDS



Scream Pretty



Scream Pretty is a UK-based jewellery brand specialising in earrings for every part of the ear — tragus, conch, rook, cartilage, and everyday wearables. Our aesthetic is bold, stackable, and self-expressive. We sell through our own Shopify store, wholesale, and on Wolf & Badger. Our customer is style-conscious, loves the curated ear, and shops across independent and mainstream brands.


  



Lily Charmed



Lily Charmed sells premium recycled sterling silver and gold-plated charm jewellery — all designed in the UK -  charms that represent the people, places, and passions in our customers' lives. Our charms are compatible with Pandora-style bracelets and positioned as a quality demi-fine alternative. Our customer is a thoughtful gift-buyer or a charm collector telling their story.


  

Both brands are distinct in tone, audience, and aesthetic. You will be responsible for maintaining two separate, high-quality social presences that feel nothing like each other.



EXPERIENCE REQUIRED



•  5+ years managing social media for a product-based or e-commerce brand — not agency only.

•  Proven experience growing and scaling social accounts, not just maintaining them.

•  Demonstrable results improving engagement, not just follower count.

•  Experience managing more than one brand or audience simultaneously.

•  Strong portfolio of short-form video content and social-first creative work demonstrating growth results.

•  Proven track record of using analytics to improve performance, not just report on it.



Skills & Tools

•  Expert-level Canva — templates, brand kits, and social asset production.

•  Proficient video editing in CapCut, InShot, or equivalent mobile/desktop tools.

•  Strong written English — captions must be sharp, persuasive, on-brand, and in British English.

•  Comfortable with social analytics tools — native insights and third-party reporting.

•  Ability to work independently, manage own time, and hit deadlines without hand-holding.



Mindset

•  Growth-oriented — focused on improving performance, not just output.

•  Commercially aware — understands how social supports revenue and business objectives.

•  A team player who brings ideas to the table, not just executes a brief.

•  Genuinely passionate about fashion, jewellery, or lifestyle brands.

•  Detail-obsessed — wrong font, wrong tone, wrong hashtag matters to you.

•  A self-starter with a solutions-not-problems attitude.

•  Comfortable working async and communicating clearly in writing.

•  Open to using AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT) to accelerate ideation and drafting.



NICE TO HAVE



Experience with jewellery, accessories, or fashion brands specifically.

•  Familiarity with 
 for task and approval management.

•  Understanding of SEO as it applies to Pinterest and YouTube.

•  Experience with Klaviyo or
 marketing platforms.



WHAT WE OFFER

$800 – $1,200/month USD depending on experience, reviewed at 6 months.

•  Full-time remote role — work from anywhere in the Philippines.

•  Flexible hours with a minimum 4-hour daily overlap with UK time.

•  Opportunity to own the social strategy for two distinct, growing UK jewellery brands.

•  Supportive team environment with clear processes and AI tools to support your work.

•  Direct access to the founder and marketing manager, and input into brand direction.

•  Long-term role with room to grow as the business scales.



Note on salary: We are aware that $800–$1,200 is at the mid-range for this level of experience in the Philippines. We are open to discussing salary for exceptional candidates with a strong portfolio.



HOW TO APPLY

•  Your CV or LinkedIn profile.

•  A portfolio or links to social accounts you have managed — please specify your exact role on each and what results you achieved.

•  A 2-minute Loom video showcasing examples of your work and explaining why you want this role.

•  A short paragraph on how you would approach managing two brands with different audiences across the same platforms.

•  Your current or most recent monthly salary in USD.

Applications without a Loom video and examples of work will not be progressed. We are looking for someone who can demonstrate results, not just list responsibilities.

title: Social Media Marketer (Online Jazz Education)
description:
(DO NOT
 US YOUR RESUME. WE ONLY CONSIDER CANDIDATES WHO FILL OUT OUR APPLICATION BELOW)



About the Role:



If you're someone who loves social media marketing, gets just as excited about strategy as you do building out content, and wants to take ownership of a key marketing channel in a growing online business, read on...



Learn Jazz Standards is a thriving 7-figure online music education business helping adult musicians finally learn to play jazz without the overwhelm. We're a small team, and that allows us to work fast. We've built a healthy content ecosystem across YouTube, blog, podcast, and
 — and now we're ready to make social media a serious, measurable growth channel.



We're looking for a Social Media Marketer who can do it all: build and execute a strategy, manage the content calendar, create and repurpose content, run ManyChat funnels, and ultimately turn Instagram and
 into real lead generation and sales engines for our business. This role sits at the intersection of execution (posting, scheduling, replying to comments) and strategic marketing (lead gen funnels, selling in the DMs, data driven decision making).



This is a full-time remote role reporting directly to the Founder. You'll be given strategic direction and goals, but we expect you to bring your own ideas, initiatives, and creative thinking to the table.



What You'll Own:



Content Strategy & Execution:



-Dramatically increase our content output across Instagram and
 — both in volume and quality



-Develop and manage a content calendar using tools like Meta Business Suite or Metricool



-Repurpose our deep content library (YouTube videos, course clips, live Q&As, podcast transcripts, blog posts) into platform-native content: Reels, Stories, carousels, static graphics, and more



-Write compelling captions, select strategic hashtags, and publish content consistently



Respond to and manage post comments, and interact with leads in the DMs



Content Creation:



-Create graphics and short-form video edits when needed (basic video editing required — we have a video editor for heavier lifts, but you need to be able to move fast independently)



-Work within our existing brand assets while having the skill to build new templates in Canva or similar tools when the 
nt calls for it



Lead Generation & Sales (Our Primary Objective):



-Build and manage ManyChat funnels to convert social media engagement into
 subscribers and customers



-Create automated DM flows that generate leads and nurture toward sales



-Develop lead magnets from our existing content library to drive opt-ins



-Think like a marketer first: every piece of content should serve a lead generation or sales objective



Strategy & Analytics:



-Analyze platform data to understand what's working, what's not, and why



-Bring data-informed recommendations to weekly strategy sessions with the Founder



-Proactively identify new opportunities for growing reach, leads, and sales



-Build repeatable systems and document your processes so nothing lives only in your head



What the First 90 Days Look Like:



By the end of your first 90 days, we expect you to have:



-Built out a new and improved social media strategy alongside the Founder



-Taken full ownership of the content calendar and posting schedule



-Meaningfully increased our content output across Instagram and



-Launched at least one ManyChat funnel driving measurable leads



-Established a reporting rhythm with clear KPIs and progress updates



-Demonstrated early, measurable progress — in leads, engagement, or both



What Makes You a Great Fit:



Must-Haves:



-3+ years of experience managing social media for a brand with a lead generation or sales focus — not just vanity metrics

Demonstrated ability to build ManyChat (or equivalent) funnels from scratch — chat automations, DM sequences, lead gen flows



-Strong content creation skills: you can write a great caption, design a clean graphic, and do basic video editing without needing hand-holding



-Comfortable with analytics — you know how to read the data and make decisions from it

Systems-oriented: you build repeatable processes, document your work, and don't let things fall through the cracks



-Self-starter who takes initiative rather than waiting to be told what to do



-Proficient with tools like Meta Business Suite, Metricool (or similar), Canva, and AI tools for content ideation and creation



Strong Plusses:



-Experience with content repurposing workflows — turning long-form content (video, podcast, blog) into social-native formats



-Background in
 marketing or digital funnels (understanding the broader customer journey matters here)



-Genuine enthusiasm for or knowledge of music — especially jazz or music education. Our audience is adult musicians, and understanding how they think, what they struggle with, and the language they use will make everything you do more effective



Compensation & Structure:



Type: Full-time, remote



Salary: $1,500/month (1,075,905 PHP/year)



13th Month Pay: paid out in December



End of year performance bonuses: paid out in December if applicable



Reports to: Founder



Support: You'll have access to a video editor for repurposing existing content, Founder guidance, and support from other tea
mbers when needed.



TO APPLY FILL OUT THIS SHORT APPLICATION:

 US YOUR RESUME. WE ONLY CONSIDER CANDIDATES WHO FILL OUT OUR APPLICATION)

you are still learning GoHighLevel

you need constant hand-holding

you take shortcuts

you disappear or communicate poorly



You ARE a fit if:



you know GHL deeply

you can fix and finish someone else’s build

you build clean, stable systems

you want a real long-term opportunity



To apply, send:



your GHL experience

examples of complex builds

whether you’ve fixed a partially built system before

whether you’ve used conversational AI in GHL

your rate

why you’d be a trustworthy person to work with long term



Do not send a generic copy-and-paste application. Be specific. Show me you actually read this.

description:

title: Online Math/Science Teacher(Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

title: Sales Development Representative
description:
Waiterix | Harmonia Enterprises LLC



About Waiterix



Waiterix is an AI-powered hospitality platform designed to help restaurants operate more efficiently, increase revenue, and deliver better customer experiences. Our solution includes:



•An AI receptionist that answers calls and manages reservations

•An AI waiter integrated into a digital menu for seamless ordering and payment

•A business insights dashboard that enables data-driven decision-making



Waiterix addresses critical operational challenges in the restaurant industry, including missed calls, staff shortages, slow service, and limited visibility into performance. This is a mission-critical solution, not a discretionary tool.



 Role Overview



We are expanding across the United States and are seeking a Sales Development Representative (SDR) based in the Philippines to support our growth.



This is a remote, performance-driven role focused on:



•Cold calling restaurant owners and decision-makers in the U.S.

•Delivering product demonstrations

•Closing new business

•Managing client relationships to ensure retention



You will play a key role in introducing Waiterix to prospective clients and maintaining long-term relationships that generate recurring revenue.



Key Responsibilities



•Conduct outbound cold calls to restaurants across the U.S.

•Engage directly with owners and managers

•Present Waiterix in a clear, concise, and value-driven manner

•Identify operational challenges and position appropriate solutions

•Deliver product demonstrations

•Close new client accounts

•Onboard new customers and ensure successful activation

•Maintain ongoing client relationships to support retention and recurring revenue



 Compensation



•Base Pay: $5 USD per hour

•Commission: 3% recurring monthly commission on each closed and retained client ($3,000 per month)

•Earning Potential: Performance-based, with scalable recurring income tied to client retention



Candidate Profile



We are looking for candidates who demonstrate:



•Strong spoken English with a clear, neutral or American-accented tone

•Confidence in cold calling and sales conversations

•Ability to communicate value clearly and persuasively

•Comfort with technology and ability to learn SaaS products quickly

•Self-motivation and the ability to work independently

•Resilience and professionalism in handling objections





Preferred:



•Prior experience in sales, customer service, or call center environments

•Experience with SaaS or technology products





What You’ll Gain



•Experience in a high-growth AI and SaaS company

•Exposure to the U.S. business and hospitality market

•Opportunity to build recurring commission-based income

•Flexible, remote work environment with autonomy

•Direct contribution to scaling an innovative technology product



Why Join Waiterix



Waiterix is at a critical growth stage, building a global end-to-end AI platform for the hospitality industry. This role offers the opportunity to be part of that expansion while developing valuable skills in technology sales and client management.

title: AI Video Editor (Ecommerce Ads) – Hiring 2 ASAP
description:
About Us

We’re a rapidly scaling ecommerce company focused on producing high-performing video ads for direct-to-consumer brands across categories like health, footwear, and lifestyle.



Our team specializes in creating conversion-driven creatives at scale—and we’re expanding.



We’re currently hiring 2 AI Video Editors who can start immediately and join us within the week.



--



About the Role

We’re looking for editors who can produce highly realistic AI-generated ads that blend seamlessly with real-world footage. This role is perfect for someone who understands how to balance creativity with performance, and can consistently deliver high-volume ad variations.



You’ll be working on short-form, direct-response ads designed to convert across paid social platforms.



--



Key Responsibilities

• Produce 20–50 AI-generated video ads per week across multiple brands

• Generate AI avatars, UGC-style clips, and supporting visuals using modern AI tools

• Edit all assets in CapCut with strong attention to pacing, structure, and polish

• Research competitor creatives across platforms like Meta and Google to inspire new variations

• Develop and test different hooks, angles, and concepts to improve performance

• Support minor script tweaks or hook improvements when necessary (scripts are typically provided)



--



Requirements

• Demonstrated experience creating AI-generated ads for ecommerce brands

• Hands-on experience with tools such as Higgsfield and ElevenLabs

• Advanced CapCut editing skills with a strong portfolio of work

• Ability to generate realistic AI visuals (people, environments, product scenes)

• Strong understanding of direct-response creative principles

• Capable of working independently while maintaining high output



--



Preferred Experience

• Familiarity with tools like Midjourney, Runway, Kling, or Sora

• Experience using Meta Ads Library or similar platforms for ad research

• Background in producing UGC-style creatives for paid ads



--



Role Information

• Part-time (32 hours weekly)

• Flexible working hours (Monday to Saturday)

• Fully remote

• Immediate hiring for 2 positions (target onboarding: this week)



--



Application Instructions

To show that you’ve read the full job description, begin your application with:



AICreator492



Then answer the following:



1. Describe your step-by-step process for creating a fully AI-generated UGC-style ad, starting from receiving a script up to delivering the final version in CapCut.

2. What tools do you currently use for AI video, image, and voice generation? Please include your skill level for each (beginner, intermediate, advanced).

3. What methods do you use to make AI-generated people and scenes look realistic for paid ads? How do you avoid common AI artifacts or unnatural visuals?

4. When reviewing competitor ads, what specific signals or elements do you focus on to identify high-performing creatives?

5. On average, how much time do you need to produce a fully AI-generated 25-second short-form ad from start to finish?

6. Share links to your portfolio showcasing realistic AI-generated ecommerce ads that demonstrate your ability to create high-converting content.



If you’re excited about pushing the limits of AI-generated video and building creatives that drive real results, we’d like to work with you.

title: Operations Virtual Assistant
description:
Join the Aventus Team!



We are Aventus — a boutique customer experience BPO based in Charleston, South Carolina, delivering exceptional omnichannel support to 100+ valued clients and partners in the e-commerce space.



Check out our website:

About the Role

As an Operations VA, you will support day-to-day operational workflows, focusing heavily on data entry, inventory tracking, and retail account coordination. This role is critical in helping streamline processes and reduce bottlenecks as the business scales.



What You’ll Be Doing



1. Data Entry & Retail Account Support

- Communicate inventory updates with tea
mbers



- Maintain accurate inventory records

- Support general warehouse operations workflows

- Assist with wholesale and merchandising workflows

What You’ll Bring to the Table

mbers or departments

etings and daily check-ins

title: QuickBooks Bookkeeping Assistant + AR/Admin Support

RESPONSIBILITIES

Note: All client communication will be reviewed and approved before being sent.

HOURS

PAY

WHY WORK WITH US?

HOW TO APPLY (IMPORTANT)

title: Short-Form Video Editor for Social Media Agency (Reels / TikTok / Shorts)
description:
We're a New Zealand-based AI-powered marketing agency looking for a skilled short-form video editor to join our team on an ongoing basis.



What you'll be editing:



- Instagram Reels (vertical 9:16, 15-90 seconds)

- TikTok videos (vertical 9:16, 15-60 seconds)

- YouTube Shorts (vertical 9:16, under 60 seconds)

-
 Reels (vertical 9:16)



All from the same raw footage — you'll produce platform-ready cuts for each.



The work:



You'll receive batches of raw footage from content creators (talking head, behind-the-scenes, product demos, training footage) and turn them into scroll-stopping short-form content. We handle strategy, scripting, and briefs — you handle the edit.



Typical batch: 5-10 raw clips ? 5-10 finished shorts per batch, delivered within 48 hours.



What we need from you:



- Deep knowledge of what works on Reels/TikTok/Shorts right now. Fast cuts, text overlays, pattern interrupts, hook-in-first-2-seconds editing. You watch these platforms daily and know what's trending.

- CapCut Pro or DaVinci Resolve proficiency. We don't use Premiere for this work — CapCut is our primary for speed + native features.

- Auto-captions done right. Styled, timed, readable. Not default auto-captions — formatted to match brand.

- Sound design basics. Trending audio selection, SFX timing, music bed mixing.

- Fast turnaround. 24-48 hour turnaround per batch of 5-10 clips. Revisions within 12 hours.

- Taste. You can look at a raw clip and know what the final cut should feel like. You don't need to be told where to cut — you feel it.



Industries you'll be editing for:



- Health & fitness (MMA fighter, personal trainer content)

- DTC supplements / wellness brands

- Professional services (wealth management, advisory)

- AI / tech education content



Nice to have:



- Experience editing for accounts with 10K-500K+ followers

- Portfolio showing Reels/TikTok work (not just YouTube long-form or wedding videos)

- Understanding of hook theory (first 1-2 seconds) and retention editing

- Ability to suggest improvements ("this clip would hit harder if we...")

- Experience with motion graphics / animated text (basic — not After Effects level)



What we provide:



- Clear creative briefs with reference examples for each batch

- Brand guidelines per client (colours, fonts, tone)

- Raw footage organised and labelled

- Quick feedback (usually same-day)

- Ongoing work — not a one-off project. We're building a team.



Tools you'll use:



- CapCut Pro (primary editing tool)

- Google Drive (file delivery)

- Slack or WhatsApp (communication)

- Loom (for feedback walkthroughs when needed)



Schedule:



Part-time, ~20-30 hours per week. Flexible hours — we care about turnaround speed, not when you sit at your desk. Must overlap with NZ business hours (NZST) for at least 2-3 hours daily for communication.



Pay:



$400-800 USD/month depending on experience and output quality. Paid monthly via Wise.



To apply:



1. Send 3 examples of short-form video edits you've done (Reels/TikTok style — NOT long-form YouTube or wedding videos)

2. Tell me which platforms you personally use daily and what editing style you think works best right now

3. Tell me your turnaround time for a batch of 10 clips



We respond to every serious application within 48 hours.

title: BUSINESS OPERATIONS & SYSTEMS ORGANISER
description:
JOB TITLE

BUSINESS OPERATIONS & SYSTEMS ORGANISER



==================================================



JOB DESCRIPTION

An established Australian business is looking for a full-time Business Operations & Systems Organiser to help build the financial tracking, reporting, and organisational systems the business needs as it grows. This is a role with real responsibility - you will work closely with the business owner to design and maintain the tools that give them a clear view of their numbers at all times.



The business already has one VA handling day-to-day operations. This role works alongside them but focuses on a different layer - expense tracking, bookkeeping, reporting, and keeping things organised behind the scenes. You will work directly with the business owner to understand what data matters, build practical systems to capture it, and keep everything running smoothly.



If you enjoy turning messy problems into clean, working systems and you like having the space to figure things out - you will do well here.



---



WHAT WE OFFER



* Full-time, long-term position (40 hours per week)

* Stable role with an established Australian business

* PHP 33,500 starting salary, increasing to PHP 35,000 after probation

* 13th month pay and government-mandated benefits

* Fully remote - work from home

* Casual, supportive working environment with a direct and approachable business owner

* Real ownership and autonomy - you build the systems, not just maintain them



---



WHAT YOU'LL DO



* Build and maintain financial tracking systems (Airtable, Google Sheets, or similar) that link income and expenses to individual accounts

* Record operational costs and track profitability at the account level

* Track total funds across accounts and pending withdrawals so the business owner always has a clear cash position

* Manage bookkeeping in Xero, including regular reconciliation

* Produce weekly reports covering balances, expenses, profit per account, and account purchasing trends

* Spot and raise anything that looks off in the numbers early, so small issues don't become big ones

* Design and build new tracking or reporting systems as needs come up, using AI tools where they help

* Help the business owner stay on top of their week - following up on pending items, flagging deadlines, and keeping things structured

* Coordinate with the first VA where workflows connect, particularly around transaction data



---



REQUIREMENTS



* Comfortable working with numbers - you do not need to be an accountant, but financial data should feel natural to you

* Confident with spreadsheets and data tools (Airtable, Google Sheets, or similar) - you have built trackers or structured systems before

* Comfortable with Xero or happy to learn it - bookkeeping will be a regular part of the role and we will support you getting up to speed

* A natural self-starter - you are the kind of person who looks for what needs doing and gets on with it, asking questions along the way

* Strong written and spoken English - you will write reports and summaries, and communicate daily via 

* Already using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, or similar) in your work - even in simple ways, as long as it is part of how you actually get things done

* Happy working in a role that will evolve over time - the systems are still being built, and that is part of what makes this role interesting

* Reliable computer and stable internet connection



---



NICE TO HAVE (NOT REQUIRED)



* Prior bookkeeping or accounting experience

* Familiarity with Airtable, including views, formulas, and linked records

* Experience building operational dashboards or reporting systems

* Background in a data-driven business (e-commerce, trading, finance, or similar)



---



SCHEDULE



* Full-time, 40 hours per week

* Australian daytime hours (approximately 10am - 6pm AEST)

* Daily communication via 



==================================================



Once your application is submitted, you will receive an
 from us with the next steps and instructions for the hiring process.

title: Senior KYC & Document Verification Specialist
description:
We are looking for a highly experienced Senior KYC & Document Verification Specialist to join our operations team.

About the Role

You will be responsible for reviewing and analyzing client-submitted documents (IDs, bank statements, utility bills, proof of address, selfies, etc.) to determine their authenticity. Your main job is to spot real vs. fake or altered documents and clearly explain your reasoning.

This is a critical quality control role that helps ensure our documentation meets strict standards for online casinos and financial platforms.

Key Responsibilities



Carefully review KYC/AML documents including government IDs, bank statements, utility bills, Social Security cards, and selfies.

Analyze documents for signs of forgery, tampering, editing, or inconsistency.

Provide clear, detailed feedback on why a document appears genuine or suspicious.

Work closely with our image editing team to improve document quality through targeted feedback.

Help create and maintain SOPs (dos and don’ts) for document preparation and verification.

Flag high-risk or problematic submissions for further review.



Requirements

title: WordPress & Webflow CMS Developer
description:
**Overview**

We are a US based real estate marketing company looking for a skilled WordPress & Webflow CMS Developer to manage, improve, and scale our websites. This role includes ongoing site management, performance optimization, and migrating an existing Webflow site into WordPress with dynamic (CMS-driven) pages.



**Key Responsibilities**



* Migrate an existing Webflow website to WordPress, including CMS collections (dynamic pages such as listings, properties, blog posts, etc.)

* Rebuild dynamic functionality using WordPress (Custom Post Types, fields, and templates)

* Maintain and update multiple websites (design tweaks, content updates, landing pages)

* Improve site speed, SEO structure, and mobile responsiveness

* Implement new features (user accounts, gated content, lead capture forms, etc.)

* Troubleshoot bugs, plugin conflicts, and site issues

* Collaborate on ongoing marketing initiatives and landing page builds



**Technical Requirements**



* Strong experience with WordPress (themes, plugins, and backend customization)

* Experience with Webflow CMS and site structure

* Familiarity with Custom Post Types, Advanced Custom Fields (ACF), and dynamic templates

* Basic knowledge of HTML, CSS, and responsive design

* Experience with page builders (Elementor, Bricks, or similar preferred)

* Understanding of website performance optimization and SEO best practices



**Nice to Have**



* Experience building real estate or listing-style websites

* Familiarity with CRM integrations or lead capture tools

* Experience creating scalable systems for content-heavy sites



**Work Structure**



* Ongoing part-time role (monthly work + project-based tasks)

* Flexible hours, but must be responsive and meet deadlines



**Compensation**



* Hourly rate based on experience 

* Consistent monthly workload with additional paid projects



**Ideal Candidate**



* Detail-oriented and proactive

* Strong communication skills

* Able to suggest improvements, not just execute tasks

* Comfortable working on multiple projects at once



To apply, please fill out google form that is how we will review applicants.

title: SHOPIFY OPERATIONS MANAGER
description:
WHO WE ARE

Modern Viking is a fast-growing premium ecommerce brand selling Norse-inspired axes, knives, and gear. We're not just a men's brand — we're one of the go-to destinations for gift giving. Birthdays, Father's Day, Christmas, anniversaries — people come to us when they want to give something bold, meaningful, and unforgettable. Our customers are gift buyers, collectors, and people who live life on their own terms.

We're a lean, ambitious team and we're scaling fast. We need someone who can run our Shopify store like they own it — not someone who waits to be told what to do.



THE ROLE

This is not a basic VA position. You will own the day-to-day operations of our Shopify store, help grow our conversion rate and average order value, manage customer service, coordinate freelancers, and keep the business running smoothly so the founder can focus on growth.

If you're results-driven, proactive, and take pride in making a store perform — this role is for you.



WHAT YOU'LL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR

Store Operations



Product listings, collections, pricing, and inventory management

App installation, setup, and ongoing optimisation

Upsell and cross-sell setup (post-purchase flows, cart upsells, bundles)

Conversion rate optimisation — product pages, mobile experience, trust signals

Promotions, discount codes, and seasonal campaign setup

Weekly performance reporting — revenue, conversion rate, AOV



Customer Service



Managing all customer
s and chat tickets

Handling refunds, damaged orders, and disputes

Responding to reviews

Building and maintaining our CS response library



Team & Admin



Briefing and managing freelancers (designers, copywriters)

Keeping projects on track and deadlines met

Documenting processes and building SOPs

Light design work in Canva — banners, product images, promotional assets





YOU'RE RIGHT FOR THIS ROLE IF



You have real hands-on Shopify experience and can name the apps you've used

You think in revenue — you ask "will this make money?" before you start a task

You write customer responses that sound human, not robotic

You send updates before being asked

You can manage freelancers without needing to be micromanaged yourself

You've actually improved a store metric and can show it





DO NOT APPLY IF



You've never worked inside a Shopify store backend

You need constant direction to know what to work on

You treat deadlines as suggestions

You copy-paste generic customer service templates

You're looking for a quiet, low-effort side gig





WHAT WE OFFER



Starting pay: $700–$1,000/month for 20 hours per week

100% remote, flexible working hours

Direct access to the founder — no corporate layers

Real responsibility from day one

Clear path to full-time as the business grows

You'll be a core part of a scaling brand, not just a task monkey





HOW TO APPLY



The name of a Shopify store you've worked on and one specific metric you improved (conversion rate, AOV, CS response time — anything measurable)

The upsell or post-purchase apps you've used and why

A Loom video (3–5 minutes) where you walk us through a Shopify store you've managed, show us something you improved, and tell us why you'd be the right person for Modern Viking. No Loom video = no response.



We are looking for someone who moves fast, owns their work, and genuinely cares about results. If that's you, we want to hear from you.

title: Pre-Press Specialist
description:
Overview

We’re looking for a detail-oriented Pre-Press Specialist to support our production team by preparing high-quality, print-ready files for multiple printers. This role is critical in ensuring accuracy, speed, and consistency across all artwork before it goes into production.



Key Responsibilities

Prepare and convert design files (from Adobe Illustrator and Photoshop) into print-ready formats based on specific printer requirements

Separate artwork into proper layers (base white, design, and clear top layers) according to production specs

Create realistic mock-ups to showcase how designs will appear on cups for customer approval

Process files from multiple sources, including:

Custom designer submissions

Website orders (customer-created designs)

Wholesale artwork requests via

Ensure all files meet quality and technical standards before production

Communicate with the team in real time to resolve file issues and maintain workflow efficiency



Performance Expectations

Handle 150–180 files per week per specialist

Maintain an average turnaround time of ~10 minutes per file (depending on complexity)

Support continuous production needs, helping cover gaps in operational hours



Requirements

Strong proficiency in Adobe Photoshop and Adobe Illustrator

Solid understanding of print production and different printer specifications/formats

High attention to detail with strong quality control skills

Ability to work efficiently under time pressure and manage high-volume tasks

Flexible availability, including potential weekend work and coverage across time zones

Responsive and reliable communication via Slack, Line, or WeChat during working hours

title: Email Automation Specialist – DTC Supplements | Performance-Based
description:
Who We Are

We are a fast-growing DTC health and supplement dropshipping brand operating through Funnelish, scaling aggressively on Meta Ads across European markets. We move fast, we track everything, and we reward performance.



The Role

We are looking for an experienced
 Automation Specialist who can build and manage a full
 marketing system from the ground up. This is not a flat salary role. You earn based on what you deliver -- 15% of all revenue generated purely from your
 flows and campaigns. The better you perform, the more you earn. Simple.



What You Will Do



Set up and configure our
 marketing platform (we are open to your recommendation)

Build a GDPR-compliant re-engagement and opt-in campaign for our existing customer base

Design and implement core automation flows:



Welcome sequence

Post-purchase / upsell flow

Abandoned checkout recovery

Win-back / re-engagement flow

Promotional broadcast campaigns





Write compelling
 copy tailored to supplement/health buyers

Set up proper tracking and attribution so revenue from
s is clearly measurable

Report on performance weekly (open rates, click rates, attributed revenue)

Continuously test and optimize subject lines, sequences, and offers





What We Are Looking For



Proven experience with
 automation for DTC / e-commerce brands

Supplement, health, or beauty niche experience is a strong plus

Solid knowledge of at least one major ESP (Klaviyo, ActiveCampaign, Mailchimp, or similar)

Understanding of GDPR and
 compliance (our market includes Poland and the EU)

Ability to write direct-response
 copy that converts

Someone who works independently and takes full ownership of the
 channel

You are motivated by results, not hours -- this role rewards performance directly





Compensation

15% of net revenue attributed purely to your
 flows and campaigns.

No base salary. Pure performance. If your
s generate €5,000/month, you earn €750. If they generate €20,000/month, you earn €3,000. The ceiling is yours to set.

Attribution will be tracked transparently and agreed upon before we start.



How to Apply

Please send us:



Your previous experience with
 automation for DTC or e-commerce brands

Examples of flows or campaigns you have built and results they generated (revenue, open rates, conversion rates)

Which ESP you prefer to work with and why

A short note on how you would approach building an
 system for a supplement brand with an existing customer base and no prior
 consent



We review every application and will get back to serious candidates quickly.

title: Funnelish Funnel Builder — Health Supplements (Europe & UK Market)

We are a fast-growing e-commerce company selling health and beauty supplements across Poland, the UK, and other European markets. We build and test multiple products per week using Funnelish, and we need a skilled funnel builder who can keep up with that pace without sacrificing quality.

Long-term cooperation for the right person

Your availability in CET timezone

title: Growth & Marketing Systems Specialist (Lead Gen, Email, AI Automation)

 marketing, and systems operations.

 and LinkedIn outreach campaigns

Lead Generation & Campaign Execution

title: Experienced Medical Biller
description:
I am a Virtual Assistant posting this position on behalf of our dermatology clinic. We have a dedicated team of VAs, some of whom have been with us for over a year, reflecting our commitment to growth and long-term opportunities. We offer annual raises, paid lunches and breaks, and a collaborative, supportive environment.



We are seeking an organized and detail-oriented Experienced Medical Biller to join our team. You will manage medical billing and coding tasks to ensure accurate and timely reimbursements. Dermatology experience is a plus but not required. Candidates must have at least two years of medical billing experience and be available for 20 hours per week during Pacific Time hours. You can work 40 hours if you’re open to other roles (answering phones).



Key Responsibilities:

Prepare and submit claims to insurance companies, ensuring accuracy and compliance.

Review and resolve claim denials and rejections, working with insurance companies for prompt payment.

Maintain accurate patient billing records and update patient information.

Assist patients with billing inquiries, insurance coverage, and payment options.

Collaborate with the healthcare team to support seamless billing and coding processes.

Handle ad hoc administrative tasks related to billing and revenue cycle management.

Maintain HIPAA compliance and confidentiality at all times.

As you become proficient, opportunities to take on additional responsibilities will arise, with the potential to grow into a full-time role



Requirements

Minimum 2 years of experience as a medical biller; dermatology experience preferred but not mandatory.

Strong knowledge of medical billing and coding, including CPT, ICD-10, and HCPCS codes.

Excellent attention to detail and organizational skills.

Ability to work 20 hours per week during Pacific Time hours.

Proficiency with medical billing software and EMR/EHR systems.

Strong communication skills and a customer-focused attitude.

Ability to handle ad hoc tasks and multitask in a fast-paced environment.

Willingness to be cross-trained in additional tasks such as patient scheduling and answering phone calls.



Trial Period

Candidates will undergo a one-week paid trial period to evaluate performance, workflow compatibility, and overall fit for the role

This trial also allows candidates to assess if the position aligns with their expectations and availability

Continued engagement or employment will be determined based on mutual fit and performance during the trial period



Technical Requirements:

Laptop or desktop with 8GB RAM, Core i5 or above.

USB headset with noise-cancellation feature.

Willingness to use video and conduct screen shares during shifts.

Hubstaff (time tracking).

Main internet speed: at least 75 Mbps (wired connection preferred)



Application Instructions

To apply, please submit the following in a single Google Drive folder (PDFs only) with view access enabled:

1) Updated resume

2) Screenshot of typing speed test (60–80 WPM minimum)

3) Screenshot of internet speed test (minimum 75 Mbps)

4) Screenshot or list of your full work setup and specifications



Important: To ensure you’ve read the full job description, please include “MEDICAL BILLING DERM” in the subject line of your application.

title: META ADS MEDIA BUYER + VIDEO AD EDITOR - SUPPLEMENT DROPSHIPPING | EUROPE
description:
META ADS MEDIA BUYER + VIDEO AD EDITOR - SUPPLEMENT DROPSHIPPING | EUROPE



Location: Remote (CET timezone required)

Type: Full-Time

Pay: €70/week, paid every Monday



---



WHO WE ARE



We are a fast-scaling supplement and health & beauty dropshipping brand running aggressive Meta Ads campaigns across European markets. We test fast, scale winners, and cut losers without hesitation. We are not a branding agency. We are not a corporate ecom business. We are dropshippers - and we need someone who understands exactly what that means.



We are a small, tight team. No corporate politics. No pointless meetings. Just fast decisions, real money, and real results.



---



THE ROLE



This is a combined role. You are both our Media Buyer and our Video Ad Editor. You run the ads. You also produce the creatives. You see what is working, you rip and adapt accordingly. No waiting. No back and forth. Full ownership.



Reports To: COO



---



RESPONSIBILITIES



Media Buying



-> Launch and manage CBO campaigns daily following our proven SOPs

-> Check campaign performance every morning and act immediately

-> Kill underperforming campaigns the 
nt spend thresholds are hit - no hesitation, no "let's wait and see"

-> Scale winning campaigns following our daily and weekend surf scaling rules

-> Add fresh creatives to winning campaigns consistently

-> Test new products with structured, disciplined testing setups

-> Send a daily performance report every day before 5PM CET - including weekends

-> Be online and responsive during CET hours every single day



Video Ad Editing



-> Find and download winning competitor ads using our tools

-> Rip and adapt competitor creatives for our market and products

-> Change voiceovers using ElevenLabs

-> Add captions and text overlays using CapCut

-> Apply hook tweaks, scroll stoppers, and pacing changes to make ads fresh and compliant

-> Use AI tools we provide to produce creatives fast and at volume

-> Deliver ready-to-launch creatives based on what the data tells you is working



---



WHAT A NORMAL DAY LOOKS LIKE



Morning - Log in, check overnight performance, apply kill or scale rules immediately, flag anything urgent.

Mid Morning - Optimize active campaigns, act on data, no delays.

Midday - Research winning competitor ads, rip and adapt creatives, produce new variations using CapCut and ElevenLabs.

Afternoon - Launch new creatives into active campaigns, research new angles.

End of Day - Send daily report on 
 before 5PM CET.



---



TOOLS WE PROVIDE



-> CapCut

-> ElevenLabs

-> CaptionsAI

-> GetHookd

-> Trendtrack

-> Meta Ads Manager

-> WeTracked

-> Google Sheets

-> 

-> Custom AI reporting agents



---



RESULTS WE EXPECT



-> Campaigns actioned daily without being asked

-> Underperforming ads killed on time - no money burning while "analyzing"

-> Minimum 3-5 new adapted creatives per week ready to launch

-> Daily report sent every day without exception

-> Profitable ROAS above our BER of 1.4-1.5, targeting 2.5-3.0+

-> Weekend scaling handled proactively and independently



---



4R MODEL



Role - You are the person responsible for both our paid media performance and our creative production. You are in the trenches daily, making fast decisions with real money. You own the results.



Responsibilities - As listed above. You act, you produce, you report. Every day.



Results - Profitable campaigns. Fresh creatives weekly. Daily reports. No excuses.



Requirements



-> Real proven experience running Meta Ads for dropshipping brands - not agencies, not branding, not general ecom. Dropshipping.

-> Supplement, health, or beauty niche experience strongly preferred

-> Comfortable with CapCut, ElevenLabs, and AI creative tools

-> Available CET timezone every day including weekends

-> Fast, clear communicator - no essays, no excuses

-> Self-sufficient and independent - you figure things out

-> Portfolio with real results required - ROAS numbers, ad spend managed, niches



---



WHO THIS IS NOT FOR



-> Agency media buyers who manage brand awareness campaigns

-> People who need to be told what to do every day

-> People who write long analysis reports but take no action

-> Anyone who says "let's wait and see" when a campaign is losing money

-> People who treat weekends as days off



---



COMPENSATION



-> €70/week fixed, paid every Monday

-> Performance profit share on top for strong results

-> Long-term role with real growth as we scale hard



---



HOW TO APPLY



-> Your experience with Meta Ads for dropshipping brands - niches, results, ROAS numbers

-> Your experience with video ad editing - CapCut, ElevenLabs, AI tools

-> Portfolio or examples of ads you have edited or campaigns you have managed

-> Your answer to this: A campaign has spent $40 with 0 sales and low initiate checkout rate. What do you do?



Keep it short and specific. We read every application and respond to serious candidates fast.

title: Growth-Minded Mid/Senior Python Developer
description:
Do you enjoy development and stimulating work that we approach like a game, with challenges and learning, all while doing great work with teammates who care? Let’s team up.



We believe in people. This is why we only work with clients who serve people. From firefighters, to law firms, to suppliers sending life-saving food to kids dying of malnutrition, the code you write will help make the world a better place.



Our team is made up of people who want to do the best work of their life. People who love to learn, challenge themselves, grow and have some fun along the journey. We also care about each other – we support each other in our own personal goals and vision. We are human beings before employees and we love to bring out the best in each other.



Now, ready to learn more about this opening? Buckle up.



If you work here, you’ll be:

- Challenged to do the best work of your life in a supportive environment.

- Become the best communicator you can become (this is the most important thing we do).

- Have the space to ask questions, voice your feedback and make a difference (and be yourself).

- Help expand our codebase and tools, participate in code reviews, and grow with your fellow developers.



You’ll do well in this job if you:

- Have a strong background in Python and understand HTML, CSS and Javascript enough to be dangerous.

- Enjoy working with people who actually care about what they do and will not let you be lazy or do sloppy work.

- Have an opinion and care about best practices and love learning and creating and building.

- Are familiar with common things we deal with as developers: Git, SQLAlchemy, building and engaging with APIs, linters, etc.

- Have grit and determination and are someone who will exceed no matter what gets in your way.

- Are attentive to details.

- Have 3+ years of Python development experience.



You probably shouldn’t apply if:

- You’re “just looking for extra money.”

- You like working 5 full-time jobs because all you care about is work.

- You get offended easily and take things personally.

- You are not someone with grit and determination who can persevere while being challenged to do great work.

- You get overwhelmed easily with new code, new habits, new learnings and chat messages.



The interview process:

- Since 99% of our work is done via Slack (we don’t do scheduled calls), the entire interview process will be via
. (With lots of questions, sprinkled with a few voice notes)

- You may be able to speak with a developer or two on our team to see how they like the role.



If you work here:

- You’ll get 13th month salary, Filipino holidays, unlimited time off (we don’t count sick days), a normal working day schedule (no night shifts, although an early start is preferred for time overlap) with some flexibility, a week off during the holidays in December, and the opportunity to grow and become your best self.



A little more about us:

- We’ve been in business for a decade+. Our teams are remote (mostly in the Philippines). Our longest standing tea
mber has been with us for over 13+ years. We've had people quit smoking on our teams with our help, lose weight, learn a new instrument, speak a new language, and more. We all love what we do.



How to begin

- Your mission, should you choose to accept, is to send us an
 with 3 questions you have about this role. If you’re currently in a full-time role and are looking for something new, we’re open to a transition window. We actually care about your happiness.



NOTE: While we like AI, and we use it in certain circumstances, we ask that no AI be used during communication. Communication is the most important thing we do. If I don't see your natural voice from our first interaction, then you're setting an inaccurate representation of who you are and how you communicate. And when I see that change, it's going to come across as a lack of harmony in how you communicate.

title: Meticulous UX Designer
description:
Are you obsessed with how designs look and feel? Do you believe great design can change lives? Let’s team up.



We believe in people. This is why we only work with clients who serve people. From firefighters, to law firms, to suppliers sending life-saving food to kids dying of malnutrition, the work you do will help make the world a better place.



Our team is made up of people who want to do the best work of their life. People who love to learn, challenge themselves, grow and have some fun along the journey. We also care about each other – we support each other in our own personal goals and vision. We are human beings before employees and we love to bring out the best in each other.



Now, ready to learn more about this opening? Buckle up.



If you work here, you’ll:

- Be challenged to do the best work of your life in a supportive environment.

- Become the best communicator you can become (this is the most important thing we do).

- Have the space to ask questions, voice your feedback, and make a difference.

- Help shape the design of our products from the ground up, participating in stimulating conversations with like-minded people.



What you could be working on:

- Designing intuitive, scalable interfaces for that solve real problems.

- Turning rough ideas, feedback notes, or “brain dumps” into clear user flows, wireframes and mockups that tell a story from start to finish.

- Building and maintaining a thoughtful design system that keeps our tools consistent, accessible, and efficient 

- Working closely with developers throughout implementation, reviewing builds, and fine-tuning details to make sure the final output matches the design intent.

- Refining the small details that elevate the experience, including micro-interactions, states (hover, active, error, empty), spacing, iconography, and motion.

- Simplifying complex workflows by breaking them into logical, digestible steps and removing unnecessary friction wherever possible.

- Contributing to product discussions early by challenging assumptions, suggesting alternative approaches, and advocating for the user perspective.

- Supporting clear design handoffs with well-organized files, annotated flows, and defined components so the team can build efficiently.



You’ll do well in this job if you:

- Bring at least 3 years of experience with building designs and UX

- Have a strong sense of visual design, always putting usability first. You obsess about how design looks, and you care even more about how they work.

- Communicate clearly and confidently in English, and can walk others through the reasoning behind your design decisions. You don’t just say what looks better, you explain why it solves the problem.

- Enjoy exploring new tools and improving your workflow, whether that’s Figma or anything else that helps you do better work. - You’re naturally helpful and like making collaboration easier for everyone.

- Have clear opinions on best practices, but stay open to feedback. You’re confident in your thinking, yet flexible enough to test, refine, and evolve your ideas.

- Have the persistence to push for a better user experience, even when it takes extra effort. You don’t settle for “good enough” if you know it can be improved.

- Pay close attention to detail. If something is slightly misaligned or inconsistent, you notice it and fix it.

- Can take a rough collection of ideas and turn it into a clear, structured, and polished layout independently. You’re comfortable shaping ambiguity into something concrete.

- Are okay with healthy debate. If something doesn’t serve the user, you’re willing to say so and back it up with solid reasoning.

- Take ownership of handoffs. Your files are clean, layers are organized, and notes are clear so developers and teammates can move quickly without guesswork.

- Approach problems with curiosity. If a button isn’t being clicked or a form isn’t being completed, you want to dig in and understand what’s really going on.



You probably shouldn’t apply if:

- You’re “just looking for extra money.”

- You like working 5 full-time jobs because all you care about is work.

- You get offended easily and take things personally.

- You are not someone with grit and determination who can persevere while being challenged to do great work.

- You get overwhelmed easily, new habits, new learnings and chat messages.



The interview process:

- Since 99% of our work is done via Slack (we don’t do scheduled calls), the entire interview process will be via
. (With lots of questions, sprinkled with a few voice notes)



If you work here:

- You’ll get 13th month salary, Filipino holidays, unlimited time off (we don’t count sick days), a normal working day schedule (no night shifts, although an early start is preferred for time overlap) with some flexibility, a week off during the holidays in December, and the opportunity to grow and become your best self.



A little more about us:

- We’ve been in business for a decade+. Our teams are remote (mostly in the Philippines). Our longest standing tea
mber has been with us for over 14+ years. We've had people quit smoking on our teams with our help, lose weight, learn a new instrument, speak a new language, and more. We all love what we do.



How to begin:

- Your mission, should you choose to accept, is to send us an
 with 3 questions you have about this role. If you’re currently in a full-time role and are looking for something new, we’re open to a transition window. We actually care about your happiness.



NOTE: While we like AI, and we use it in certain circumstances, we ask that no AI be used during communication. Communication is the most important thing we do. If I don't see your natural voice from our first interaction, then you're setting an inaccurate representation of who you are and how you communicate. And when I see that change, it's going to come across as a lack of harmony in how you communicate.

title: Video Editor (FPV Drone Content)
description:

You will be responsible for editing FPV drone footage into high-quality, cinematic videos for social media, marketing, and promotional use. This includes fast-paced aerial shots, outdoor footage, and visually dynamic content captured through FPV drones.

You will collaborate closely with our creative and executive team to execute high-quality content across multiple platforms.



In addition to core editing responsibilities, this role offers the opportunity to expand into video editing enhancements, animation, and graphic design, and may eventually support the setup and management of marketing systems such as
 campaigns, digital stores, and CRM workflows. However, the primary focus of this role is video editing.

“I am fluent in English, I am experienced in video editing using tools such as Premiere Pro, and I have used 
 for collaboration and feedback. I will be available to work up to 10 hours/week as soon as possible.”

Responsibilities:

mbers to develop video concepts and creative direction.

mbers and clients to refine and improve edits.

Preferred Experience & Skills:

•Familiarity with animation and graphic design tools (e.g., After Effects, Canva, or similar)

•Creative mindset with a passion for visual storytelling

•Ability to work independently and communicate effectively in a remote setting via
 and/or WhatsApp, Google Calendar

Stretch Goals/responsibilities

•Assist in basic marketing initiatives such as
 campaigns or content distribution

•Help manage and organize CRM systems and workflows

title: Automation & CRM Systems Specialist (AI Automation)
description:
Job Title: Automation & CRM Systems Specialist (AI Automation)

Location: Remote

Employment Type: Contract (Long-Term)

Working Hours: EST / PST Overlap Preferred

Compensation: Flexible ($500–$1,500/month depending on scope & experience)





Overview

We are currently hiring across multiple roles for our clients. Because of this, we are looking to build a pipeline of highly skilled Tech Virtual Assistants and Automation Specialist who specialize in different areas such as , CRM management, automation, building workflows, and systems operations.



This job post outlines the core skill sets we are hiring for. Candidates with experience in one or more of these areas are encouraged to apply, as we will match applicants to the most suitable role based on their strengths and experience.

We are especially interested in individuals who are tech-savvy, systems-oriented, and able to work independently in fast-paced environments.



Core Focus Areas 



You may be a fit if you have strong experience in one or more of the following:

1. Automation & Systems Engineering

• Build workflows using n8n, Zapier, or Make 

• API integrations, webhooks, and data synchronization 

• Automation across CRM,
, calendar, and outreach tools 

2. CRM & Pipeline Management

3. Outreach & Marketing Automation

• Cold
 systems (Instantly or similar)

4. AI & Voice Automation

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

System Setup & Implementation
