• Set up pipelines, automations, and integrations across tools 

• Connect platforms such as
, calendar, outreach, and data tools 

Automation & Workflow Management

• Design and maintain workflows 
, SMS, pipelines, reminders) 

• Ensure seamless data flow across systems 

• Configure booking systems, triggers, and multi-step automations 

Integrations & Technical Operations

• Manage API connections, webhooks, and third-party integrations 

• Ensure accurate CRM data synchronization 

• Maintain system reliability across multiple environments 

AI & Communication Systems

• Implement AI tools for content, automation, and workflows 

• Configure voice AI systems for inbound/outbound communication 

• Support automation for campaigns, outreach, and internal ops 

Monitoring, Troubleshooting & Optimization

• Monitor system performance and resolve issues quickly 

• Fix broken automations, data inconsistencies, and integration errors 

• Continuously optimize workflows for efficiency and scalability 

Documentation & Support

• Create SOPs and system documentation 

• Conduct walkthroughs and handoffs when needed 

• Support leadership with system insights and improvements 

________________________________________

Basic Requirements (Must-Have)

• Strong experience with at least one CRM (GoHighLevel or HubSpot)

• Experience with API integrations, webhooks, and workflow logic

/SMS automation systems

________________________________________

Nice-to-Haves

• Experience with Voice AI platforms (e.g., Retell AI)

________________________________________

KPIs / Success Metrics

• Timely delivery of system builds and updates 

• Fast turnaround on troubleshooting (24–48 hours)

________________________________________

Who This Role is For

• Tech-savvy VAs who can own backend operations end-to-end

________________________________________

How to Apply (IMPORTANT)

Hiring Process

title: HR Employee Relations
description:
An HR Employee Relations (ER) professional acts as the primary link between an organization and its employees. Their core mission is to foster a positive, compliant, and productive work environment while mitigating risks related to workplace conflict.

Unlike generalist HR roles, ER focuses specifically on the health of the employer-employee relationship.

Core Responsibilities

1. Conflict Resolution and Mediation

ER specialists serve as neutral parties to resolve disputes between coworkers or between managers and their subordinates.

Conducting formal mediations to reach amicable solutions.

Identifying root causes of recurring team friction.

Coaching managers on how to have "difficult conversations."

2. Workplace Investigations

When a formal complaint is filed (such as harassment, discrimination, or ethics violations), the ER leads the fact-finding process.

Interviewing witnesses and involved parties.

Reviewing digital footprints 
s, Slack logs) and physical evidence.

Producing comprehensive reports with recommendations for disciplinary action or exoneration.

3. Policy Interpretation and Development

They ensure that the "rules of the road" are fair, legal, and clearly communicated.

Writing and updating the Employee Handbook.

Ensuring company policies align with local, and federal labor laws.

Advising leadership on the impact of new policies

4. Performance Management Support

ER provides the framework for how a company handles underperformance.

Overseeing the Performance Improvement Plan (PIP) process.

Reviewing termination requests to ensure they are legally defensible and documented properly.

Managing the offboarding process for involuntary separations.

5. Labor Relations

In workplaces with labor unions, ER professionals take on specialized tasks:

Interpreting Collective Bargaining Agreements (CBAs).

Handling formal grievances and arbitrations.

Participating in contract negotiations.

Key Skills and Qualifications

Active Listening To understand the nuances of a complaint beyond just what is said.

Objectivity To remain unbiased during investigations, regardless of who is involved.

Labor Law Knowledge To prevent lawsuits regarding wrongful termination or discrimination.

Emotional Intelligence To manage high-stress situations with empathy and calm.

Typical Job Requirements

Education: Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business, or Psychology.

Certifications: SHRM-CP/SCP or PHR/SPHR are highly valued.

Experience: Often requires 3–5 years in a generalist HR role before specializing in ER, due to the high-stakes nature of the work.

Note: The goal of an Employee Relations professional is not just to "protect the company," but to ensure the company remains a place where people want to work by maintaining a standard of fairness and respect.

title: Experienced Local SEO Specialist - US Agency (Part-Time to Full-Time
description:
We're a US-based digital marketing agency working with local businesses (agricultural, service-based, and professional companies). We're looking for an experienced local SEO specialist to manage the execution of our SEO campaigns across multiple clients.



This is not a data entry role. We need someone who can independently run local SEO campaigns: evaluate backlink prospects, write outreach that gets responses, manage Google Business Profiles strategically, and build real authority for our clients. You'll work directly with the agency owner and have autonomy over execution.



What you'll be responsible for:

- Research and secure quality backlinks through outreach (guest posts on niche blogs, local press, supplier pages, directory placements). You evaluate prospects, draft personalized outreach, negotiate placements, and follow up.

- Manage Google Business Profile for multiple clients. Create original posts 2x/week per client with local keywords and real photos. Optimize profiles (categories, services, attributes, Q&A). Monitor and respond to reviews.

- Build and maintain citation profiles across 50+ directories. Know which ones matter, submit accurately, and clean up inconsistent or outdated listings.

- Format and publish pre-written blog content in custom CMS platforms. Add internal links, optimize images, verify formatting.

- Pull monthly reporting data from Ahrefs, Google Analytics 4, and Google Search Console. Flag ranking changes, traffic trends, and issues without being asked.

- Track all work in shared Google Sheets (backlink tracker, citation tracker, content calendar, outreach log).



Requirements:

- 2+ years experience running local SEO campaigns for US-based clients (not just your own projects)

- Proven backlink outreach experience. You've sent cold
s, landed guest posts, and built real links. Not PBN, not web 2.0, not "tier 1/tier 2" link schemes.

- Ahrefs proficiency. You can navigate Site Explorer, check domain ratings, evaluate referring domains, and pull keyword data without step-by-step instructions.

- Google Business Profile management experience with screenshots or examples you can show.

- Strong English writing. Your outreach
s and GBP posts need to read like a native speaker wrote them.

- Google Sheets proficiency for tracking and reporting.

- Reliable internet connection and available during US business hours (minimum 4-hour overlap with Pacific Time).

- Self-directed. You flag problems and suggest solutions, not just wait for instructions.



Red flags (do not apply if this describes you):

- Your link building experience is primarily PBN, blog comment spam, or automated tools

- You've never worked with a US client directly

- You can't show real examples of GBP posts or outreach
s you've sent



Nice to have:

- Experience with WordPress or custom CMS platforms

- Canva or basic graphic design for GBP post images

- Google Ads or Meta Ads experience

- Experience in agricultural, equestrian, or service business niches



Hours: 20 hours/week to start. Grows to 30-40 hours/week as we add clients. This is a long-term position, not a one-off project.



Rate: $7-8/hour USD. Paid weekly or biweekly via Wise, PayPal, or Payoneer.



To apply, complete this test task (required, no exceptions):



Our client is in FL. They sell premium western hay and feed to horse owners in North Central Florida. Their biggest growth market is Ocala, FL (30 miles south), which has a massive equestrian community.



Send me:

1. A backlink you personally built for a previous client. Include the live URL, the client's domain, and how you got it.

2. One outreach
 you've sent that resulted in a placed link. Screenshot or copy/paste.

3. 2 GBP posts you've created for a previous client (screenshots).

4. Top 15 citation directories you would submit a local US business to, in priority order.



If you can't complete this task, this role is not the right fit. If you can, you're exactly who we're looking for.

title: Credit repair specialist
description:
Position: Credit Repair Virtual Assistant (Remote)



Overview:  

We are seeking an experienced and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to manage and execute credit repair services for clients. The ideal candidate must have hands-on experience with dispute processing, credit analysis, and compliance with consumer protection laws.



---



Required Skills & Experience:



- Proven experience in credit repair services

- Strong understanding of:

  - Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA)

  - Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB complaint process)

- Experience using:

  - DisputeFox (credit dispute automation software)

  - CFPB portal (filing consumer complaints)

  - Credit verification & dispute methods (Metro 2, validation, etc.)



---



Key Responsibilities:



- Review and analyze client credit reports (all 3 bureaus)

- Identify:

  - Negative accounts

  - Inquiries

  - Charge-offs

  - Collections

- Create and send dispute letters using DisputeFox

- File complaints through the CFPB when necessary

- Use proper dispute strategies (factual, validation, method of verification, etc.)

- Track progress and update client files

- Ensure all work is compliant with credit laws and ethical standards

- Maintain organized records of disputes, responses, and results



---



What You Must Know How To Do:



- Remove or challenge:

  - Hard inquiries

  - Late payments

  - Collections

  - Charge-offs

- Understand when to escalate using the CFPB

- Use dispute templates correctly (not random or illegal tactics)

- Read and interpret credit reports accurately

- Communicate professionally with clients if needed



---



Bonus Skills (Preferred but not required):



- Experience with credit monitoring tools (SmartCredit, IdentityIQ, etc.)

- Knowledge of business credit

- Experience handling high-volume client files



---



Important:



This position requires ethical and legal credit repair practices only. No illegal or misleading dispute tactics will be accepted.



---



To Apply, Include:



- Your experience with DisputeFox

- Examples of results (accounts removed, score increases, etc.)

- Tools/software you’ve used

- Availability and turnaround time per client file

title: Video Editor (Premiere Pro + After Effects | Captions + Motion | Full-Time Remote)
description:
'm looking for a dedicated, detail-oriented video editor to join De Videofabriek — a Dutch video production company — as a long-term, full-time team member.



This is not just an editing role. You'll be working closely with me on a wide range of video content: client deliverables, Instagram/LinkedIn content, and multi-format exports. You'll be involved in the process, not just handed files.



**What you'll do:**



- Edit videos based on a structured proxy workflow

- Add captions (accurate timing, clean styling) and motion graphics/animations

- Export multiple formats per project efficiently

- When no edit jobs are queued: help build and optimize templates, workflows, and systems in Premiere Pro, After Effects, and Notion

- Communicate clearly despite a language difference — most content is in Dutch and English; scripts and SRTs are always provided, and I'll brief you thoroughly on context



**What I'm looking for:**



- Strong Premiere Pro skills — fast, clean, organized

- Basic After Effects knowledge is preferred

- Experience with captions (not just auto-generated — properly timed, styled and animated)

- Comfortable working in Notion for task and project management

- Proactive, reliable, and communicative — someone who thinks along, not just executes

- Available during most of the overlapping hours, proactive and independent in other hours

- Can handle Dutch captions and subtitles without understanding the language (scripts + briefings always provided in English)



**Nice to have:**



- Experience with proxy workflows

- Familiarity with Instagram and LinkedIn-style short-form video. YouTube is a plus

- Understanding of Dutch (not required, but a big plus)



**What we offer:**



- Full-time remote position (~40 hrs/week)

- €750/month (long-term, stable work)

- Close collaboration — you won't be left in the dark

- Room to grow as systems and workload scale



**How to apply:**



Send a short message explaining your editing background + 2-3 examples of work that show captions and/or motion graphics. Bonus: tell me one thing you'd check to improve in a typical editing workflow.

description:
We are a U.S.-based real estate investment company looking for a high-performing Business Development Specialist to join our team.



This is NOT a typical VA role.



This is a sales + lead generation position working directly with off-market property opportunities.



What You’ll Be Doing:



- Outbound calling using our CRM & dialer

- Speaking with property owners in niche situations:

- Pre-foreclosures

- Tax delinquent properties

- Probates / inherited homes

- Vacant & distressed properties

- Qualifying leads (condition, timeline, motivation, price)

- Taking detailed notes and updating CRM

- Researching hard-to-reach property owners (skip tracing, online investigation)

- Setting appointments / passing qualified leads to acquisitions team



What We’re Looking For



- Fluent English (clear, confident speaking — minimal accent)

- 1+ years experience in real estate cold calling, acquisitions, or similar sales role

- Strong objection handling & communication skills

- Comfortable making high-volume outbound calls daily

- Experience with dialers/CRMs (CallTools, Mojo, BatchDialer, REISift, etc. is a PLUS)

- Strong research & problem-solving ability (finding hard-to-reach owners)

- Reliable, consistent, and results-driven mindset



Requirements:



- Fast & stable internet connection

- Quiet work environment

- Dual monitors (required)

- Headset for professional call quality

- Ability to work U.S. hours (CST preferred)



Compensation:



- Base pay: $5-6/ hour

- Commission per qualified lead / % / deal

- Performance bonuses for top producers

- Opportunity for long-term growth within the company



What Makes This Role Different:



- You’ll be working directly with a high-level real estate system (data-driven, AI-supported)

- Consistent lead flow — no guessing who to call

Clear KPIs and growth path

- We reward performance — top reps earn significantly more with commissions



Who This Is Perfect For:



- Experienced real estate cold callers who want more opportunity + upside

- Sales reps who are competitive and want to grow

- People who take ownership and don’t need micromanagement



Do NOT Apply If:



- You have no cold calling or sales experience

- You are not comfortable talking to distressed property owners

- You are inconsistent or unreliable



We are hiring immediately and looking for long-term tea
mbers only.



If you’re serious about growth and making money, apply now.

title: Video/Audio Podcast Editor
description:
Hourly Rate: $7

Hours: 10 hrs/week

Working time: Flexible schedule 

Start Date: ASAP



Summary – We are looking for a Video/Audio Editor to join our team. You will be responsible for editing a variety of content, including long-form and short-form videos, podcasts, and other digital media. This may include talking-head videos, interviews, cinematic footage (e.g., drone or outdoor content), and promotional materials.



Your role will focus on transforming raw footage into polished, engaging content that aligns with brand messaging and marketing goals. You will collaborate closely with our creative and executive team to conceptualize and execute high-quality content across multiple platforms, including social media, websites, and digital campaigns.



In addition to core editing responsibilities, this role offers the opportunity to expand into Video Editing, Animation, and Graphic Design, and eventually support the setup and management of
 marketing campaigns, digital stores, CRM systems, and other marketing operations.



Being in this position will allow you to enhance your video/audio editing skills as part of a US-based company while gaining exposure to broader digital marketing functions and working with a creative and supportive team.



Please read all REQUIRED conditions below before applying

 or similar collaboration tools

 and/or WhatsApp, Google Calendar

title: CRM / Database Specialist
description:
Hours: 10 hrs/week

Working time: Flexible schedule 

Start Date: ASAP



Summary – We are looking for a CRM / Database Specialist who can design, organize, and maintain a clean, scalable CRM system. This role requires someone experienced in database architecture, data hygiene, and workflow automation focused on backend data integrity (not marketing campaigns).



You will be responsible for structuring the CRM, standardizing data, maintaining clean records, and ensuring the system supports long-term growth and reporting.



The client is currently using ActiveCampaign and may migrate to GoHighLevel, so experience with both platforms is highly preferred.



Please read all REQUIRED conditions below before applying 



REQUIRED: Proven experience managing CRM systems and database structures

REQUIRED: Experience with data cleanup, deduplication, and merging records

REQUIRED: Strong understanding of CRM architecture (fields, tags, custom objects, relationships)

REQUIRED: Experience building workflows/automations for database updates and hygiene (not
 marketing)

REQUIRED: Experience with ActiveCampaign and/or GoHighLevel

REQUIRED: Comfortable using a time-tracking system

REQUIRED: Ability to work 10 hours per week consistently



1. When you message us to apply, you MUST include the sentence below in the subject line or first sentence of your message. Applications that do not include this will be automatically discarded:



“I can work 10 hours per week, I’m comfortable using a time-tracking system, and I can attend the stand-up call. I am reliable, proactive, and detail-oriented. My experience includes CRM systems (list platforms such as ActiveCampaign, GoHighLevel, etc.), and I have experience with database management including deduplication, standardization, workflows, and CRM structuring.”



2. A link to your CV, resume, or portfolio showing relevant CRM/database work (required) 



Responsibilities:

• Design and maintain CRM database structure (fields, tags, pipelines, relationships)

• Standardize data setup, naming conventions, and system organization

• Perform ongoing database cleanup including deduplication and record merging

• Build and maintain account/contact hierarchies

• Create workflows and automations for database hygiene (e.g., tagging, field updates, lifecycle stages)

• Audit CRM data regularly to ensure accuracy and consistency

• Support CRM migration (if applicable) from ActiveCampaign to GoHighLevel

• Document processes and maintain an organized system structure



Preferred Experience & Skills:

• Strong experience in CRM database design and architecture

• Experience with BOTH ActiveCampaign and GoHighLevel

• Experience handling CRM migrations and data mapping

• Familiarity with Zapier, Make, APIs, or other integration tools

• Understanding of reporting structures and segmentation strategies

• High attention to detail and strong problem-solving skills



Stretch Goals/responsibilities

• Recommend improvements to CRM structure and data flow

• Build scalable systems to support marketing and sales teams

• Assist with integrations between CRM and other tools

• Conduct periodic CRM audits and optimization reviews

title: WordPress Web Designer (Conversion-Focused + Basic SEO & Tracking Setup)
description:
WordPress Web Designer (Conversion-Focused + Basic SEO & Tracking Setup)

About Us



We are a UK-based LinkedIn Ads agency helping B2B companies generate leads.



We run a high-converting 1:1 workshop that turns prospects into clients.



Our current website needs improving — not a full rebuild, but a clear, simple, conversion-focused upgrade.



The Project



We are looking for a skilled WordPress web designer to:



Improve our website design and structure

Make it clear, modern, and conversion-focused

Set up tracking properly (Google Analytics & Tag Manager)

Apply basic SEO best practices



This is a fixed-price project ($300) with potential for future work.



Responsibilities

1. Website Design & Structure

Improve homepage layout and clarity

Create a clean, modern, professional design

Ensure mobile responsiveness

Improve user journey with clear call-to-actions

2. Conversion Optimisation (Important)

Make the site focused on booking a free workshop

Improve page flow and messaging structure

Add strong CTAs throughout

3. Tracking Setup

Set up Google Tag Manager

Set up Google Analytics (GA4)

Track key actions:

Page views

Button clicks

Form submissions or bookings

4. Basic SEO Setup (Not advanced SEO)

Optimise page titles and meta descriptions

Ensure proper heading structure (H1, H2, etc.)

Improve page speed basics

Make site SEO-friendly for future growth

5. Light Copy Support

Help improve wording and structure of pages

Ensure clear, professional English

Work with our input (we will provide direction and ideas)

Requirements

Must have:

Strong experience with WordPress

Experience with Google Tag Manager and Google Analytics (GA4)

Understanding of conversion-focused design

Good written English

Nice to have:

Basic SEO knowledge

Experience improving landing pages

Copywriting ability (clear and simple writing)

Budget and Timeline

Fixed price: $300

Timeline: 2–4 weeks

Potential for ongoing work after project completion

What success looks like

Website looks modern and professional

Clear message and user journey

Visitors understand the offer quickly

Tracking is set up correctly

Site is ready for future SEO growth

Important



This is not a full advanced SEO project.



We are looking for:



Clean design

Clear structure

Proper tracking setup

How to apply



Please include:



2–3 WordPress websites you have worked on

Your experience with Google Tag Manager and GA4

A short explanation of how you improve a website for conversions

The word “Workshop” at the top of your application

title: Automotive Maintenance Operations & Routing Coordinator
description:
Key Responsibilities



1. Fleet & Retail Ops Coordination

*Own the estimate-to-approval-to-route workflow:

*Create and submit estimates

*Follow up for approval

*Ensure parts are sourced

*Finalize tech routes for the following day

*Track all jobs in progress and flag issues proactively

*Ensure routes are realistic and efficient; confirm techs are prepped and ready

*Communicate clearly with customers and fleet managers about job timing, status, and follow-ups

*Submit and close out fleet approvals in Element, LeasePlan, and AutoIntegrate

*Ensure invoices match approvals; follow up on outstanding invoices and missing payments



2. Scheduling & Productivity Tracking

*Maintain the daily technician schedule, making updates as needed

*Monitor tech productivity; flag idle time, reschedules, or delays

*Track time logs and coordinate with bookkeeper for payroll



3. Customer Communication

*Respond to incoming texts, WhatsApp messages, and system inquiries in a timely, professional manner

*Follow up with clients as needed to resolve open issues or gather job-related info

*Escalate concerns appropriately and promptly



4. Admin & Reporting

*Submit a detailed Daily Recap covering completed work, pending tasks, blockers, and KPIs

*Keep Trello and other tools up-to-date with accurate job and task statuses

*Track inventory needs and coordinate ordering of parts, oil, and supplies

*Monitor A/R and follow up on past-due fleet invoices



5. Marketing & Content Support

*Publish our monthly newsletter in MailChimp with content from marketing team

*Coordinate publishing of content to Instagram /
 / Google My Business

*Other light admin support as needed for the marketing team



What Success Looks Like

*All work orders, estimates, approvals, and tech routes are handled with zero dropped balls

*You identify blockers or problems before they become fires

*Communication is clear, timely, and professional — with both customers and internal team

*The business runs like a machine — nothing gets missed or delayed

*You take full ownership of your responsibilities and require very little follow-up



Who You Are

*A natural systems thinker who thrives on clarity, organization, and ownership

*Extremely proactive — you don’t wait to be told what to do

*Excellent at written and verbal English communication

*Comfortable in the automotive world and eager to learn the details

*Sharp and reliable — you retain info, spot gaps, and follow through



Experience & Skills Required

*3+ years of experience in a remote automotive: coordinator, dispatcher, operations role

*Demonstrated responsibility for keeping things moving without handholding

*Excellent written and spoken English

*Experience with dispatch, route planning, or technician scheduling

*Familiar with tools like Slack, Google Docs, Trello (or similar), CRM/invoicing platforms

*Experience working with U.S.-based field service, auto, or fleet companies

*Bonus: Familiarity with AutoIntegrate, Housecall Pro, Element, or LeasePlan platforms



Required Software Experience

*Slack

*WhatsApp

*Trello (or similar)

*Google Workspace

*CRM / invoicing tools (Housecall Pro, AutoIntegrate)

* Monday . com (plus)



TECH REQUIREMENTS:

*Computer - at least i5 or equivalent with 8gb RAM

*Internet Speed - At least 50 MBPS Download speed

*Dual monitor setup is required to ensure efficiency in managing multiple applications simultaneously.

*Location: Remote (Philippines)

*Schedule: Part-time or Full-time, US hours



*Part-time Schedule

**Tuesday 1-5 pm

**Wednesday 1-5 pm

**Friday 8:30 - 7:30 pm

**Saturday 10-4 pm

**Sunday 2-5 pm



*Full-time Schedule

**Monday to Friday 9:30AM -6:30PM

Pay: Php288.46 - Php432.69 hourly rate



Application Instructions:

Fill out this form: 
/appqNAvkEQ10YFlc3/pagrX4PvZe0xsKHWT/form

After submitting the form, click the apply button and send us a short message on why you would be a good fit for the role.

title: CRM Data Processing VA ((1 Full-Time | 1 Part-Time – Project-Based)
description:
We are hiring 2 Virtual Assistants ((1 Full-Time | 1 Part-Time – Project-Based) to handle retention corrections and data processing across our CRM systems.



This role requires high accuracy (98%+), strong attention to detail, and comfortable communicating with U.S.-based clients.



What You’ll Do

- Correct and update policy data between Salesforce and HawkSoft

-  Identify and resolve discrepancies in policy information

-  Process policy changes (rewrites, cancellations, payments, lost policies)

-  Accurately input and maintain sensitive account data

-  Pull and process renewal information

-  Update payment and policy statuses

- Support the client payment unit by calling clients regarding policy payments

How to apply:

title: Meta Ads Media Buyer (B2B Lead Gen – NO Creative Work)
description:
***DO NOT APPLY UNTIL YOU HAVE READ THIS WHOLE JOB POST***



We’re looking for a Meta Ads Media Buyer to manage and optimise B2B lead generation campaigns for service-based businesses.



This is an execution-focused role. You will NOT be responsible for creating ad creatives or building strategy from scratch. Instead, you’ll work within proven systems to test, optimise, and scale campaigns inside Ads Manager.



If you’re strong at reading data, making decisions, and improving performance — this role is for you.



What You’ll Be Doing



Managing Meta ad campaigns (primarily lead generation)

Testing new creatives (provided to you)

Turning off underperforming ads based on data

Scaling winning ads and ad sets

Monitoring CPL, lead quality, and overall performance

Making daily optimisation decisions inside Ads Manager

Communicating when new creatives are needed based on performance



What You WON’T Be Doing



Creating ad creatives

Writing copy or hooks

Building funnels or landing pages

Client communication



Requirements



Experience managing Meta 
/Instagram) ads

Strong understanding of lead generation campaigns (not ecom)

Experience with B2B campaigns

Ability to analyse performance and make clear decisions

Comfortable working with multiple ad accounts

Reliable, consistent, and detail-oriented

Good written communication



Nice to Have



Experience optimising for booked calls / qualified leads (not just cheap CPL)

Familiar with testing frameworks and scaling strategies



Compensation



On-target earnings: $1,000-$1,600/month

Opportunity to grow with more accounts over time



TO APPLY PLEASE ANSWER THESE SIX QUESTIONS:



1. Your experience with Meta ads (brief summary)

2. How much ad spend you have managed

3. Types of campaigns you’ve managed (lead gen, niches, etc.)

4. Any results you’ve achieved (CPL, volume, etc.)

5. How you d
 when to turn off an ad

6. Share a
 or Instagram ad you find highly effective and explain why it works.





We’re looking for someone long-term who can take ownership of execution and help us scale campaigns efficiently.

title: Executive Assistant to CEO
description:
Position Overview:



As the Executive Assistant to the CEO, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring the smooth and efficient functioning of the executive office. Your primary responsibility will be to provide comprehensive administrative support to the CEO, managing their schedule, and coordinating various tasks to enhance productivity. Your ability to maintain confidentiality, exercise sound judgment, and proactively handle administrative duties will contribute to the overall effectiveness of the CEO's office.





Pay Range: $8 per hour with a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents.





About Power Plus Systems:



Power Plus Systems LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission.





Objectives:

• Manage and organize the CEO's daily schedule, including meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.

• Act as a gatekeeper, screening and prioritizing communications to the CEO.

• Coordinate and facilitate communication between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders.

• Anticipate the CEO's needs and proactively handle tasks to ensure optimal time management.

• Coordinate special projects and initiatives as assigned by the CEO.





Competencies:

• Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills, with keen attention to detail.

• Strong written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to maintain confidentiality and exercise discretion in handling sensitive information.

• Proficient in using Microsoft Office and Google Suites.

• Familiarity with scheduling software; experience with additional productivity tools is an advantage.

• Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to interact effectively with individuals at all levels.

• Proactive problem solver and resourceful thinker.





Equipment Requirements:

• Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently.

• Must own and actively use an iPhone and/or MacBook or Mac computer for efficient communication and task management.

• High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work.





Physical Requirements:

• Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer.



Benefits:

• Growth opportunities in a well-established company.

• Ongoing training and professional development opportunities.

• Opportunity for advancement within the company.

• A supportive and collaborative work environment.

• Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time).

• Paid vacation.





How to Apply:



If you are ready to join Power Plus Systems, LLC, a well-established residential electrical contractor that values its tea
mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below.




/internationalcareers



Power Plus Systems, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds to apply.



Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

Tools

GoHighLevel

title: Full-Time Virtual Assistant: Admin, Operations & AI-Assisted Work
description:
About the Role

I'm looking for a sharp, highly adaptable Virtual Assistant to take ownership of the day-to-day work that keeps my business running. Full-time, starting at $450/month, with real room to grow as you prove yourself.

The core trait I'm hiring for is adaptability. I need someone who can do basically anything I throw at them, figure out what they don't already know, and get it done. If you need detailed instructions for every task, this role isn't for you. I won't always be available to answer questions, so you need to go from problem to solution on your own.

What You'll Be Doing

A rotating mix of admin, operations, and content coordination. Examples:



Monitoring and managing my inbox: triaging, flagging what needs me, handling what doesn't

Drafting and sending
 replies on my behalf

Coordinating with my team and instructing them on tasks I assign

Tracking progress across projects and keeping me updated throughout the day

General administrative work

Placing orders and managing purchases

Posting content to my blog. I run a blog, and you'll be transcribing posts from my
s or voice notes and publishing them. You won't be writing the content, just formatting and posting.

Working in Google Sheets and Excel for tracking, reporting, and data entry

Using AI tools (especially Claude and Claude Code) to get through tasks faster. This is important. A lot of what I do is AI-assisted, and you need to be comfortable working that way.

Anything else that comes up. This role is deliberately broad.



What I'm Looking For



Excellent written and spoken English

Strong administrative and organizational skills

Good with computers in general

Confident with Google Sheets and Excel

Strong with AI tools, especially Claude and Claude Code. If you haven't used Claude Code specifically, you need to be the type of person who will learn it quickly and properly.

College degree preferred (strong experience can override this)

Extremely resourceful. You can Google, investigate, and work things out on your own.

Adaptable. The work varies a lot day to day.

Reliable, detail-oriented, and discreet with sensitive information

Comfortable receiving instructions through voice notes



What I'm NOT Looking For



Someone who needs constant check-ins

Someone who asks three clarifying questions before attempting anything

Someone who waits for perfect instructions before starting



Working Hours

Roughly 8 hours a day, sometimes split across the day. A typical day looks like:



2 hours in the morning

1 hour around lunch

2 hours in the afternoon

2 hours later on (flexible, depending on what my staff need)



Timezone: I'm based in the UK. I'm an early riser (up around 5:00 AM UK time), but you only need to be available from 7:00 AM UK time onwards. The main working window is roughly 10:00 AM to 5:00 PM UK time, with the split schedule giving you flexibility in between.

I'll check in with my employees morning and evening UK daytime. No late evening work required. You just need to be responsive during the day and stay coordinated with me and the team.



Compensation & Growth



$450/month starting, full-time

Raises and expanded responsibility as you demonstrate value

Long-term role for the right person



How to Apply

Send a message that includes:



A brief intro about yourself and your relevant experience

What AI tools you've used, plus a specific example of a real task you used them on

A specific example of a time you solved a problem without being told how

Your working hours and timezone

Start your subject line with: VA Application: [Your Name]



Applications that don't follow all five steps won't be reviewed. This is the first filter.

title: 2D/3D Animator (Blender + After Effects)
description:
About Us

We are looking for a full-time Animator for our YouTube channels:



• 

• 



We make documentary-style videos that explain complex stories in a clear and engaging way.





Role Overview

This role focuses on two core tasks:

• Geolayer3 map animations (2D / 2.5D / 3D)

• 2D & 3D animations in After Effects using custom models, icons and elements you create or modify.



You will read a brief, visualize the sequence, and deliver polished shots that match our style. You must be able to handle 3d modes, animation, and compositing as needed.





Key Responsibilities

• Build cinematic map animations: routes, movements, markers, labels, zooms, elevation, highlights

• Create or modify 3D models of vehicles, equipment, terrain, and props (modeling, kitbashing, UVs, textures, basic rigging)

• Animate 3D shots: camera moves, turntables, reveals, exploded views

• Composite icons, labels, and images for clarity

• Keep project files clean and organized (naming, versioning, tidy scenes)

• Work closely with editors and producers; share WIPs and take notes

• Track tasks in Notion, deliver files to Dropbox

• Optimize scenes for fast iteration and re-renders.





Minimum Requirements

• 5+ years in 3D and motion graphics for documentaries/explainers

• Expert in After Effects (compositing, 2.5D camera, motion blur, overlays)

• Expert in 3D (modeling, UVs, texturing, shading, lighting, rendering, basic rigging)

• Strong skills in Illustrator/Photoshop (icons, labels, map elements)

• Strong visual storytelling and ability to execute independently

• Fluent English (written and spoken)

• Daily working overlap with Cyprus business hours (Mon–Fri)

• Familiarity with ChatGPT and AI tools for workflow support





Nice to Have

• Experience with stylized or data-based mapping workflows

• Interest in defense, aviation, military history, or geospatial visualization





Your Setup

• Workstation with 64 GB RAM minimum (more preferred), strong GPU/CPU

• Fast, stable internet (30-50 Mbps upload recommended)





Contract & Hours

• Full-time, remote

• Core overlap with Cyprus time required

• Must follow YTMG’s confidentiality, IP, communication, and schedule policies





How to Apply

Please send your CV and showreel/portfolio, along with:

1. Two end-to-end examples: one map animation and one 3D model-based animation (brief ? what you built ? tools used)

2. A short breakdown of a complex shot (goal, approach, modeling steps, pipeline)

3. Your hardware specs and a recent internet speed test screenshot

4. One sentence confirming you have read and accept the expectations listed above

title: Female Bridal Phone Agent - Help Brides Find Their Dream Dress
description:
About the Role

As a Female Bridal Phone / Customer Support Representative, you’ll spend your day speaking directly with brides-to-be who have expressed interest in visiting our partner bridal boutiques. Your role is to build rapport, answer questions, understand their needs, and help guide them toward booking their bridal gown appointment.



You’ll be the warm, reassuring voice supporting brides during an important part of their wedding journey, making them feel heard, cared for, and excited about their visit.



What You’ll Do



Make outbound calls to brides who have submitted online inquiries

Build genuine, warm connections in every conversation

Qualify leads by understanding their style, budget, timeline, and needs

Guide brides through the booking process and help secure appointments

Accurately update lead details and appointment information in our CRM

Maintain daily call reporting and attend training sessions as required



Who We’re Looking For



Excellent spoken and written English

A confident, friendly phone presence with strong people skills

Experience calling online leads is preferred

Familiarity with CRM systems (Go High Level is a plus)

Patience, empathy, and the ability to keep conversations positive and relaxed



Technical Requirements



Stable internet connection with at least 20 Mbps upload and download speed

Quality headset and microphone

Computer with a minimum of 8GB RAM



Perks of the Role



Paid, comprehensive training

Stable, long-term work-from-home opportunity

Supportive and friendly team environment

Internet allowance to support your home setup

Paid time off during Christmas



What to Expect



Comprehensive paid training: 8 hours per day

Work schedule aligned with US time zones (Eastern or Pacific)

Some Saturday availability is required as part of the role, but not every Saturday



How to Apply

Please include a voice recording or short video introduction with your application. This is required.



To confirm you’ve read the full job post, include the number 67 in your message.

title: Creative & Website Assistant
description:
Position Overview



Phoenix Performance Solutions is looking for a creative, reliable, and tech-savvy Creative & Website Assistant to help support our growing brand across sports, supplements, apparel, events, and marketing. This person will play an important role in helping us create strong visuals, maintain and improve website content, and use modern tools, including AI, to work faster and smarter.



This is a great opportunity for someone who is naturally creative, enjoys design and digital tools, can follow brand direction well, and wants to grow with a company over time. We are not just looking for someone to complete random tasks. We want someone who can help us consistently make Phoenix look more professional, more engaging, and more organized across our marketing and web presence.



This role is best suited for someone who is strong in visual creativity first, but also comfortable helping with basic website work and AI-supported content creation.



Main Role Focus



This role is primarily focused on the following areas:



1. Creative Design Support



The main responsibility of this role is creating graphics and visual materials that help Phoenix market its products, services, leagues, tournaments, and promotions more effectively. This includes:



Flyers

Promotional graphics

Social media visuals

Product images

Website banners

Event graphics

Sales graphics

Simple branded marketing materials



The person in this role should be able to take an idea, message, or rough direction and turn it into a polished visual that looks clean, professional, and engaging.



2. Website Content & Visual Updates



This role will also support the website by helping update content and visuals inside WordPress and Elementor. This may include:



Updating landing pages

Swapping images

Adding banners or graphics

Updating product page visuals

Making simple layout adjustments

Uploading new promotional sections

Helping keep pages visually consistent and current



This is not intended to be a heavy coding or advanced developer role. It is more about maintaining and improving the website from a creative and content standpoint.



3. AI-Assisted Creative and Workflow Support



We want someone who is comfortable learning and using AI tools to improve speed, quality, and efficiency. This may include:



Using AI to brainstorm creative ideas

Assisting with basic copy drafts

Creating or refining image concepts

Generating variations of ads or promotional ideas

Using AI tools to improve workflow and productivity



We are especially interested in someone who is curious, adaptable, and open to using modern tools to get better results faster.



Detailed Responsibilities



The Creative & Website Assistant may be responsible for tasks such as:



Designing digital flyers for leagues, events, product offers, and promotions

Creating graphics for social media posts, stories, ads, and announcements

Designing banners and promotional images for the Phoenix website

Helping create product visuals for supplements, apparel, or team gear

Updating website pages using WordPress and Elementor

Uploading and formatting graphics and content on the website

Creating visual templates that can be reused for future promotions

Resizing designs for different platforms and uses

Assisting with sponsor graphics, information sheets, and simple branded materials

Organizing brand assets, files, and design folders

Using AI tools to support design, creative ideation, and productivity

Helping Phoenix maintain a stronger and more consistent overall brand presence

What Success in This Role Looks Like



Success in this role is not just about making nice-looking graphics. It is about helping Phoenix become more consistent, more efficient, and more professional in how it presents itself.



A successful person in this role will:



In the First 30 Days

Learn the Phoenix brand, style, and priorities

Show they can follow instructions and complete tasks on time

Create clean, usable graphics with minimal hand-holding

Demonstrate basic confidence with WordPress and Elementor updates

Communicate clearly and respond reliably

Show willingness to learn and improve quickly

In the First 60 to 90 Days

Begin creating stronger graphics with less revision needed

Help improve the visual quality and consistency of Phoenix marketing materials

Become dependable for recurring design and website tasks

Start suggesting helpful creative ideas instead of only waiting for instructions

Use AI tools effectively to increase output and speed

Help reduce the amount of time the founder spends fixing graphics or basic website issues

Long-Term Success

Phoenix has a cleaner, more professional visual brand across its website and marketing

Promotions, flyers, and graphics are created faster and at a higher quality

Website pages stay current and visually appealing

The person becomes a trusted creative support asset to the company

They grow into taking more ownership of design and visual content over time



A great hire in this role will make it easier for Phoenix to market consistently without everything depending on the founder to create, revise, or manage every visual asset personally.



Ideal Skills to Have



These are the skills and qualities that would make someone especially valuable in this role.



Design Skills

Strong eye for layout, spacing, and visual balance

Ability to create engaging flyers, graphics, and marketing visuals

Experience with Canva, Adobe Express, Photoshop, or similar tools

Ability to maintain a clean and professional style

Understanding of how to make content visually appealing without making it cluttered

Website Skills

Basic experience with WordPress

Basic experience with Elementor

Confidence updating website pages, images, and simple content sections

Ability to keep pages organized and visually clean

Familiarity with WooCommerce is a plus

AI & Tech Skills

Comfortable using AI tools such as ChatGPT or image-generation tools

Ability to use AI to improve speed, idea generation, and workflow

General comfort with digital tools and learning new platforms

Strong tech adaptability

Communication & Work Style

Good written English

Able to follow instructions carefully

Responsive and dependable

Organized with files and task management

Open to feedback and able to apply revisions well

Self-motivated and willing to learn

Bonus Experience



These are not required, but would be a strong plus:



Experience working with sports, fitness, supplements, apparel, or ecommerce brands

Basic video editing ability

Experience creating ad creatives

Experience with product page images or promotional layouts

Experience supporting a small business founder or startup team

Familiarity with social media content creation

Who This Role Is Best For



This role is ideal for someone who:



Is naturally creative

Likes making things look better and more professional

Enjoys using design tools and digital platforms

Wants to grow with a company

Is comfortable wearing a few related hats within a creative-focused position

Can balance creativity with structure and follow-through

Who This Role Is Not For



This role is probably not the best fit for someone who:



Only wants to do admin work

Has no interest in design or visual content

Is not comfortable learning new tools

Needs constant supervision for every task

Has no interest in WordPress or website support

Wants a highly specialized senior designer or developer role

Performance Expectations



The person in this role should be able to:



Meet deadlines consistently

Produce quality work without excessive revision

Communicate clearly about progress and blockers

Take feedback professionally

Improve over time

Help Phoenix move faster by reducing delays in creative and website-related work



Work Samples Required

To be considered for this role, applicants should submit examples of their previous work. We would like to see samples that demonstrate their creativity, design ability, and overall quality of work. These can include flyers, promotional graphics, website visuals, social media graphics, landing pages, or other relevant creative projects. If they have experience with WordPress or Elementor, examples of pages they have worked on are a strong plus. If they have used AI tools in their workflow, we would also like a brief note explaining which tools they used and how they used them.

title: Senior Appraisal Coordinator
description:
**ONLY APPLY VIA THE LINK PROVIDED BELOW. DM'S SENT ON ONLINE JOBS WILL NOT BE RESPONDED TO**



If you’ve worked inside a US Appraisal Management Company and you know the difference between a 1004 and a Field Review, a TAT and a due date extension, an ENB file and a standard PDF delivery — this role was written for you.

We’re not looking for someone we need to teach the industry. We’re looking for someone who already speaks it fluently and is ready to own it.



Senior Appraisal Coordinator



Company: Pahroo Appraisal and Consultancy, LLC - Chicago USA.

Location: Remote (US hours)

Type: Full-Time

Hours: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST, Monday to Friday

Salary: PHP 55,000 – PHP 95,000



ABOUT PAHROO

PahRoo Appraisal & Consultancy LLC is a Chicago-based real estate appraisal firm operating across residential and commercial markets in Illinois and Texas. We work with AMCs, direct lenders, and private clients, and we are growing — deliberately and with the right people.



We run a ROWE culture: Results Only Work Environment. We don’t count hours. We count outcomes. If you’re a professional who delivers without being micromanaged, you’ll thrive here.



THE ROLE

This is a senior front office position with real ownership. You will be the operational engine of our Appraisal Operations Department — the person who keeps orders moving, clients updated, appraisers scheduled, and nothing falling through the cracks.



You’ll work directly with our Appraisal Operations Manager, hold independent decision-making authority on day-to-day coordination, and play a hands-on role in shaping how our front office runs as we scale.



This is not a task-ticker role. It is a thinking role for someone who takes pride in running a tight operation.



WHAT YOU’LL OWN

– Full order lifecycle management across ANOW — from bid acceptance through report delivery and closure

– Independent bid decisions on standard residential assignments; zero waiting on someone else to move your queue

– Inspection scheduling and appraiser route optimization for our Chicago and Dallas markets

– Outreach calling and pipeline management across our AMC and direct client accounts

– Report delivery via AMC portals in all required formats — PDF, XML, ENB

– Revision management end-to-end — you communicate, you track, you close

– Zoho CRM ownership for outreach tracking and lead pipeline management

– Keeping ANOW audit-ready at all times — data integrity is non-negotiable here



WHAT WE NEED FROM YOU

– Minimum 2 years of experience in a US AMC, appraisal office, or appraisal management environment — this is a hard requirement, not a preference

– Working knowledge of US residential appraisal order types: 1004/URAR, FHA, Field Review, New Construction, Desktop

– Hands-on experience with ANOW or a comparable appraisal CRM (Mercury Network, Appraisal Inbox, etc.)

– Professional written and spoken English — you are client-facing from day one

– The ability to manage 20+ active orders simultaneously without losing your composure or your accuracy

– Availability to work full CST business hours: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM, Monday to Friday

– CRM experience in Zoho, Salesforce, or equivalent is a strong advantage



WHAT YOU GET

– PHP 55,000–95,000/month commensurate with experience — a senior rate for a senior hire

– Full-time, long-term contractor engagement — this is a career position, not a project

– Direct access to a senior leadership team actively investing in the right systems and the right people

– Deep, specialized expertise in the US appraisal market — one of the most defensible and transferable skill sets in offshore real estate operations

– A ROWE culture — your results define your day, not a timesheet



START DATE

Immediate. We are moving quickly on this hire and interviewing on a rolling basis. If you are the right person, we will not wait.



APPLY NOW:


/Pahroo/preview-job?jid=FKUpnx7g4/NCLEepnH23hxplCmXbkVeC5DbwzT5C4DesIFQl

title: Google Ads Performance Specialist
description:
We are a remote team supporting multiple brands across the UK and international markets.

We are looking for an experienced Google Ads specialist who can manage campaigns, improve efficiency, and consistently generate qualified leads at a sustainable cost.



This role focuses on performance, data analysis, and continuous optimisation.



Responsibilities

Manage and optimise Google Ads campaigns across Search, Performance Max, Display, and YouTube

Focus on lead generation and improving lead quality

Adjust campaigns to reduce cost per conversion and improve ROAS

Conduct keyword research and build structured campaigns

Test variations in ads, landing pages, and targeting

Monitor performance and scale campaigns that are delivering results

Review underperforming campaigns and apply improvements

Track data and prepare simple performance reports

Collaborate with internal team to improve landing page effectiveness



Requirements

Hands-on experience running Google Ads campaigns

Experience with lead generation campaigns (not just traffic)

Strong understanding of search intent and keyword targeting

Ability to improve conversion rate and reduce acquisition cost

Familiar with tracking tools (Google Analytics, Tag Manager, conversion tracking)

Comfortable working with data and making optimisation decisions

Able to work independently and deliver measurable outcomes

Stable internet connection and availability for full-time remote work



Application Requirements

Please include the following details when applying:



Examples of campaigns you have worked on

Performance proof (you may share screenshots or summary data such as CPL, conversions, ROAS, or conversion rate)

Types of businesses or industries you have supported

Specific improvements you achieved (cost reduction, lead growth, etc.)

Typical monthly budgets you have handled



Short Task Question

If you are given a £5,000/month budget targeting the UK for lead generation, briefly explain your approach:



Campaign structure

Keyword selection approach

Ad messaging direction

Landing page suggestions

Tracking setup

How you would optimise to lower cost per conversion



How to Apply

Start your application with: GOOGLE ADS PERFORMANCE



Please read the contact instructions carefully before sending your application.



Send your application to:



tomikocorbyrq094

title: MedTech Account Manager
description:
YouMed Ltd

We are an established, privately owned company specialising in working with worldwide med-tech and diagnostics businesses to support their entry into the UK market. Typical clients are smaller start-ups who rely on our guidance and expertise to expand into the UK market. Offering tailored strategic consultancy, product launch support, bespoke sales and distribution programmes, our success is built on having a strong understanding of the products, the UK clinical marketplace and a network of established relationships.



As we continue our growth we are seeking a full-time MedTech Account Manager to work closely with our Business Development team and support the Business Director in building relationships with potential clients and develop an ongoing business pipeline. 



Job Specification

The role is based on working 40 hours per week, working 6.00 am – 2.00 pm UK GMT. 

Typical activities will include:

• Developing identified warm leads into evaluation sites / trial sites and sales

o Presenting our client’s assays to Clinical Directors, Clinicians and Lab Teams within the NHS and Private MedTech sector. 

o Preparation and delivery of company presentations. 

o Understanding the client’s product and their requirements, identifying opportunities for areas of support.

o Maintaining regular client communication to find out the status of their projects.

o Leading evaluations and trials at sites including training / distribution of products.



• Keeping clear and up to date records, liaising with colleagues as appropriate.



The Person

To be successful in the role we are looking for someone who can demonstrate the following essential qualities and skills: 

• Senior MedTech Sales experience - An understanding of the MedTech/Diagnostics sector.  Proven competency in Business Development / Medical Sales or similar.

• Experience with presenting and closing sales. 

• Self-starter who is comfortable working independently on a remote basis.

• Strong communicator, able to network and develop good working relationships.

• Excellent presentation skills, spoken and written English.

• Takes an organised, systematic approach keeping thorough records. 



In addition, the following would be desirable:

• Ability to demonstrate an understanding of the UK healthcare market.

• Ability to demonstrate an understanding of the development and launch cycle of a MedTech product to be able to identify opportunities for support.



Qualifications required

• Degree educated (Medical or associated)

• Experience of working in MedTech / Diagnostics.  Preference would be having worked for or having experience with any of   the following companies however any experience in commercial Med Tech is sufficient (surgical etc):-

Roche Diagnostics

Abbott Laboratories

Siemens Healthineers

Danaher Corporation

Thermo Fisher Scientific

Becton, Dickinson and Company

bioMérieux

Sysmex Corporation

Qiagen

Hologic



• Advanced English – both written and spoken

• Competency in Microsoft Office packages



SALARY -  To be determined / negotiated depending on experience.

title: Virtual Stylist & Wardrobe Curator (Hourly, Temporary)
description:
About the Role

I’m looking for a thoughtful, fashion-minded virtual stylist to help me bring order, creativity, and fresh vision to my existing wardrobe. I’ve already photographed my clothes, shoes, bags, and jewelry. Now, I need your eye to help me put it all together.



This is a remote position where you’ll help me create styled looks for different parts of my life: speaking engagements, church services, real estate client meetings, casual outings, travel days, and formal events. We’ll use the Indyx iOS app to build and organize my wardrobe, and I’ll cover the premium subscription if needed.



You won’t need to shop for me or build a wardrobe from scratch. I simply need help refining and coordinating what I already own into outfits that are appropriate, elegant, and true to who I am.



A Little About Me



I’m a minister, real estate broker, and author based in Tennessee. I show up in many different spaces — from pulpits to closing tables to Sunday brunch — and I want my wardrobe to reflect confidence, modesty, purpose, and grace. My style is a blend of sophistication and professionalism, with a touch of Afrocentric flair.



What You’ll Be Doing:

Access my wardrobe photos inside the Indyx app and help me organize them by category, color, and occasion

Create polished and appropriate outfits for specific events like:



Sunday services

Real estate closings and networking

Speaking engagements (in person and virtual)

Brunch or lunch with friends

Travel and formal events

Build lookbooks and mood boards in the app so I can easily find what to wear

Tag each item and outfit with helpful details like occasion, season, and location

Suggest styling adjustments, accessory pairings, or layering options

Use the app’s built-in photo editor to clean up background images and help the catalog look its best

Provide brief notes or explanations for each outfit so I understand how to pull it together myself



What I’m Looking For:



Someone with experience in styling, wardrobe curation, or fashion coordination

A person who understands how to work with modest, professional, ministry-appropriate clothing

Comfortable using iOS and willing to work inside the Indyx app (training provided if needed)

Organized and good at communicating clearly and kindly

Someone who enjoys helping others look and feel their best

Bonus if you have experience building digital lookbooks or working with speakers or professionals

Details:



This is a short-term project paid by the hour

Please include your hourly rate when you apply



We’ll begin with a paid trial task (such as styling 3 to 5 looks) and move from there



I’d love to get started right away, with the project expected to last around 3 to 4 weeks, depending on how we pace it



To Apply



Please send:



A short introduction about yourself and your styling background

Your hourly rate

Any examples of work you’ve done; especially for clients who speak, teach, or lead professionally

Confirmation that you use an iOS device and are open to working inside the Indyx app

title: Cold Email Outreach/Lead gen Expert
description:

 Pay:

s landing in inbox (not spam)
